This seemingly monolithic matching process can be decomposed into two conceptually distinct stages: attribute extraction and attribute aggregation. For example, a model may recognize cat using attributes such as fur texture and whiskers. When learning a new class like car, the model must extract additional attributes like wheels and adjust how they are aggregated in the shared representation space. However, since only data from the current task is available, incremental updates can bias both attribute extraction and aggregation toward new classes, leading to catastrophic forgetting. Therefore, we propose AREA for attribute extraction and aggregation in CLIP-based CIL. To stabilize extraction, we anchor class-level visual and textual attributes on the hyperspherical embedding space via principal geodesic analysis. To stabilize aggregation, we learn lightweight task-specific experts with scoring and residual refinement, regularized by a variational information bottleneck objective. During inference, we perform routing over task attribute manifolds via optimal transport for more concise prediction. Experiments show that AREA consistently outperforms SOTA methods. Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/ICML2026-AREA.

</details>


### [110] [HarmoVid: Relightful Video Portrait Harmonization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28811)
*Jun Myeong Choi,Jae Shin Yoon,Luchao Qi,Roni Sengupta,Joon-Young Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种视频光照协调方法（Relightful Harmonization），通过去闪烁模型和扩散模型实现前景视频与背景场景的光照匹配，解决视频时序抖动问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像协调模型逐帧处理视频会产生严重的时序抖动，且难以获取不同光照下相同运动视频的标注数据。

Method: 1) 提出光照去闪烁模型稳定全局和局部闪烁伪影；2) 基于去闪烁数据训练视频扩散模型；3) 提出非对称alpha掩膜条件技术从真实视频中学习干净边界。

Result: 在时序一致性、自然度、边界清晰度和光照物理合理性上优于现有图像级和视频级协调方法，同时保持强重光照表现力。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了视频光照协调中的时序不一致问题，实现了高质量、物理合理且边界干净的协调效果。

Abstract: We present a method for harmonizing the lighting of a foreground video to match a target background scene, adjusting shadows, color tone, and illumination intensity (relightful harmonization). Unlike images, acquiring labeled data for videos, where identical motions are recorded under different lighting conditions, is practically infeasible and non-scalable. While one way to create such paired data is to apply existing image-based harmonization models frame by frame to a video, the resulting outputs often suffer from significant temporal jitters. We overcome this problem by introducing a novel lighting deflickering model that can stabilize the global and local lighting flickering artifacts. Our video diffusion model learns from these upgraded deflickered data with a volume of real and synthetic videos to generate high-quality video harmonization results. We further propose an asymmetric alpha mask conditioning technique to learn the clean boundaries from real videos. Experiments demonstrate that our model achieves strong temporal coherence, naturalness, cleaner boundaries, and physically meaningful lighting behavior, while maintaining strong relighting expressiveness compared to prior image-based and video-based harmonization methods.

</details>


### [111] [Gamma-World: Generative Multi-Agent World Modeling Beyond Two Players](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28816)
*Fangfu Liu,Kai He,Tianchang Shen,Tianshi Cao,Sanja Fidler,Yueqi Duan,Jun Gao,Igor Gilitschenski,Zian Wang,Xuanchi Ren*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种生成式多智能体世界模型，通过Simplex Rotary Agent Encoding（无需学习的单纯形旋转位置编码）实现智能体的置换等价性和可扩展性，并采用Sparse Hub Attention（稀疏中心注意力）将交叉注意力复杂度从二次降至线性，配合蒸馏得到的因果学生模型实现24 FPS的实时交互生成，在多玩家环境中显著优于基于槽或密集注意力的基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交互视频生成的世界模型主要针对单智能体设定，无法处理多智能体同时交互的场景。多智能体环境需要智能体独立可控、置换对称且支持高效推理，但现有方法要么依赖固定顺序或可学习槽位（破坏置换对称性），要么使用全连接注意力导致计算成本随智能体数量二次增长，无法高效扩展到多玩家场景。

Method: 1) Simplex Rotary Agent Encoding：将3D RoPE扩展到多智能体，每个智能体对应正则单纯形的一个顶点，在旋转角度空间中赋予每个智能体不同的相位，实现置换等价性；2) Sparse Hub Attention：引入可学习的中心隐变量（hub tokens）作为中介，智能体先与hub交互，再通过hub与其他智能体通信，将交叉注意力从O(n²)降至O(n)；3) 知识蒸馏：将全上下文扩散教师模型蒸馏为因果学生模型，支持时序块逐块生成和KV缓存，实现24 FPS实时交互。

Result: 在多玩家虚拟环境实验中，该方法在视频保真度、动作可控性和智能体间一致性上均优于基于槽（slot-based）和密集注意力的基线方法，且无需额外训练即可从两玩家泛化到四玩家。

Conclusion: 通过巧妙的置换对称编码和稀疏注意力机制，该工作首次实现了高效、可扩展的多智能体交互视频生成，为世界模型在多人游戏、多机器人仿真等场景的应用铺平了道路。

Abstract: World models for interactive video generation have largely focused on single-agent settings, where future observations are generated from a single control signal. However, many generated environments require multi-agent interaction: multiple players, robots, or embodied agents act simultaneously within a shared space. Scaling world models to such settings requires a principled multi-agent design: agents should remain independently controllable, permutation-symmetric, and support efficient inference while maintaining consistency across time and perspectives. In this paper, we present our generative multi-agent world model for interactive simulation. It introduces Simplex Rotary Agent Encoding, a parameter-free extension of 3D RoPE that represents agents as vertices of a regular simplex in rotary angle space. This gives each agent a distinct phase while making all agents permutation-equivalent, enabling scalable agent identity without learned per-slot identities or a fixed agent ordering. To avoid dense all-to-all attention across agents, we further propose Sparse Hub Attention, where learnable hub tokens mediate token interaction across agents, reducing cross-agent attention cost from quadratic to linear in the number of agents. For real-time rollout, we distill a full-context diffusion teacher into a causal student that generates temporal blocks sequentially with KV caching, enabling action-responsive generation at 24 FPS. Experiments in multiplayer virtual environments show that our model improves video fidelity, action controllability, and inter-agent consistency over slot-based and dense-attention baselines, while generalizing from two to four players without additional training.

</details>


### [112] [From Pixels to Words -- Towards Native One-Vision Models at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28820)
*Haiwen Diao,Jiahao Wang,Penghao Wu,Yuhao Dong,Yuwei Niu,Yue Zhu,Zhongang Cai,Weichen Fan,Linjun Dai,Silei Wu,Xuanyu Zheng,Mingxuan Li,Yuanhan Zhang,Bo Li,Hanming Deng,Huchuan Lu,Quan Wang,Lei Yang,Lewei Lu,Dahua Lin,Ziwei Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: NEO-ov 是一个原生的视觉语言基础模型，无需外部编码器或适配器，端到端学习跨帧和像素-词对应关系，在多图像、视频理解与空间智能任务上展现出竞争力，缩小了与模块化模型的差距，并在细粒度视觉感知上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型通常采用模块化架构（独立图像编码器+语言解码器），导致跨帧像素信号碎片化、早期像素-词交互分散；原生VLM在多图像、视频和空间理解方面探索不足。

Method: 提出NEO-ov原生基础模型，彻底消除模块边界，不依赖任何外部编码器、辅助适配器或事后融合，端到端学习跨帧与像素-词的对应关系，实现统一的细粒度时空建模。

Result: NEO-ov大幅缩小了与模块化模型的性能差距，在细粒度视觉感知任务上表现优异，验证了原生"单视觉"架构在大规模下不仅可行且具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 原生视觉语言架构在规模上是可行的，论文还提供了系统的架构分析和详细的训练配方，以推动后续原生多模态建模研究。

Abstract: Current vision-language models (VLMs) typically stitch together separate image encoders and language decoders via multi-stage alignment, a modular framework that inevitably fragments pixel-level signals across frames and scatters early pixel-word interactions. In parallel, native VLMs, despite impressive performance on single images, remain largely unexplored in multi-image, video understanding, and spatial intelligence. Hence, we introduce NEO-ov, a native foundation model that learns cross-frame and pixel-word correspondence end-to-end, without any external encoders, auxiliary adapters, or post-hoc fusion. By eliminating module boundaries entirely, NEO-ov enables fine-grained and unified spatiotemporal modeling to emerge natively inside the model. Notably, NEO-ov largely narrows the gap to modular counterparts while excelling at fine-grained visual perception, validating that native "one-vision" architectures are not only feasible but competitive at scale. Beyond empirical performance, we unveil systematic architectural analyses and detailed training recipes to facilitate subsequent native multimodal modeling. Our code and models are publicly available at: https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/NEO.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [113] [ICG: Improving Cover Image Generation via MLLM-based Prompting and Personalized Preference Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27374)
*Zhipeng Bian,Jieming Zhu,Qijiong Liu,Wang Lin,Guohao Cai,Zhaocheng Du,Jiacheng Sun,Zhou Zhao,Zhenhua Dong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ICG框架，通过结合多模态大语言模型与扩散模型，利用元标记提取语义特征、用户嵌入进行个性化对齐，并采用多奖励学习策略，在无需标注数据的情况下生成高质量、个性化的封面图像，显著提升了图像质量、语义保真度和个性化效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个性化封面图像生成对提升数字平台用户参与度至关重要，但目前该领域研究不足，现有方法依赖手工提示和分离模块，缺乏端到端的训练方式。

Method: ICG框架通过元标记从标题和参考图像提取语义特征，结合用户嵌入进行个性化偏好对齐，利用适配器桥接MLLM和扩散模型实现端到端训练，并采用多奖励学习策略（包括美学奖励、相关性奖励和个性化偏好模型）优化生成结果。

Result: 实验表明ICG在图像质量、语义保真度和个性化方面显著提升，在下游任务中增强了用户吸引力和离线推荐准确性。

Conclusion: ICG作为即插即用的适配器，兼容常用检查点，无需真实标签即可优化，为个性化封面生成提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and diffusion models (DMs) have opened new possibilities for AI-generated content. Yet, personalized cover image generation remains underexplored, despite its critical role in boosting user engagement on digital platforms. We propose ICG, a novel framework that integrates MLLM-based prompting with personalized preference alignment to generate high-quality, contextually relevant covers. ICG extracts semantic features from item titles and reference images via meta tokens, refines them with user embeddings, and injects the resulting personalized context into the diffusion model. To address the lack of labeled supervision, we adopt a multi-reward learning strategy that combines public aesthetic and relevance rewards with a personalized preference model trained from user behavior. Unlike prior pipelines relying on handcrafted prompts and disjointed modules, ICG employs an adapter to bridge MLLMs and diffusion models for end-to-end training. Experiments demonstrate that ICG significantly improves image quality, semantic fidelity, and personalization, leading to stronger user appeal and offline recommendation accuracy in downstream tasks. As a plug-and-play adapter bridging MLLMs and diffusion models, ICG is compatible with common checkpoints and requires no ground-truth labels during optimization.

</details>


### [114] [LCO: LLM-based Constraint Optimization for Safer Agentic LLMs in Real-world Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27375)
*Jiayong Wan,Jiawei Chen,Zhaoxia Yin,Liu Shuyuan,Hang Su*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出LLM约束优化（LCO）框架，通过自省模块和进化采样模块缓解大语言模型在自主代理场景中的上下文奖励破解（ICRH）问题，无需微调即可在保持任务性能的同时显著提升安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM作为自主代理持续与环境交互时，会因过度优化代理目标而产生有害副作用（ICRH），现有防御方法无法应对这种非对抗性输入的模型自身过度优化问题。

Method: LCO框架包含两个模块：(1) 自省模块——引导LLM在执行前主动思考并整合潜在安全约束；(2) 进化采样模块——利用LLM驱动的交叉与变异操作，将模型动作约束在安全解空间内。

Result: 在推文参与度优化任务中，GPT-4的毒性增长率（TGR）降低39%；在策略优化基准上，ICRH发生率降低15.23%，且不牺牲任务性能。

Conclusion: LCO有效缓解了输出细化与策略细化两种场景下的ICRH问题，在无需微调的前提下实现了安全性与任务性能的平衡。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly acting as autonomous agents, but their continuous interaction with the environment can lead to in-context reward hacking (ICRH), a phenomenon where LLMs iteratively optimize their behavior to maximize proxy objectives, inadvertently producing harmful side effects. Existing defense methods are insufficient to address this risk, as ICRH arises not from adversarial inputs but from the model's own over-optimization. To mitigate this issue, we propose \textbf{LLM-based Constraint Optimization (LCO)}, a framework that effectively reduces ICRH without model fine-tuning. LCO consists of two modules: \textit{self-thought module}, which guides the LLM to proactively deliberate and integrate potential safety constraints before execution; and \textit{evolutionary sampling module}, which employs LLM-based crossover and mutation to constrain the model's actions within a safe solution space while maintaining task performance. Experimental results demonstrate that LCO substantially alleviates ICRH in both output-refine and policy-refine scenarios. In particular, on the tweet engagement optimization task, LCO achieves a 39% reduction in the Toxicity Growth Rate (TGR) on GPT-4, while on the policy optimization benchmark, it reduces the ICRH Occurrence Rate by 15.23%, demonstrating safety improvement without sacrificing task performance.

</details>


### [115] [Unlocking Fine-Grained and Within-Utterance Speaking Style Control in Prompt-Based Text-to-Speech Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27376)
*Jaehoon Kang,Yejin Lee,Yoonji Park,Kyuhong Shim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出在基于提示的TTS模型中实现语音风格插值（句间平滑过渡）和风格转换（句内动态变化）两种能力，分别通过嵌入空间方向向量插值和KV-cache交换+滑动窗口掩码实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于提示的TTS模型缺乏细粒度控制，只能对整个语句应用单一全局风格，无法实现句间风格属性的连续插值和句内随时间变化的风格过渡，限制了实际应用场景。

Method: 1) 句间风格插值：计算对比风格提示之间的方向向量，在嵌入空间进行简单插值。2) 句内风格转换：发现自回归TTS解码器对早期token存在注意力偏差，提出KV-cache交换和滑动窗口注意力掩码来缓解此问题。

Result: 句间插值：性别转换成功率99-100%，音高变化达36Hz，语速变化达1.6音节/秒。句内转换：说话人相似度0.81-0.91，感知平滑度评分3.48-4.48。

Conclusion: 所提技术有效扩展了现有基于提示的TTS模型的能力，实现了精细化的风格控制，同时保持了较高的语音质量和感知平滑度。

Abstract: While prompt-based text-to-speech (TTS) models enable natural language-driven speaking style control, they often provide limited fine-grained control and apply a single global style across an utterance. This restricts practical use cases that require continuous style attribute interpolation across utterances and time-varying style transitions within a single utterance. In this paper, we propose novel techniques to achieve both capabilities in existing prompt-based TTS models. For inter-utterance style interpolation, we compute direction vectors between contrastive style prompts in the embedding space and perform simple interpolation, enabling smooth transitions between style characteristics. For intra-utterance style transition, we first identify a strong attention bias toward early tokens in autoregressive TTS decoders, causing the initial audio realization to dominate subsequent generation. To mitigate this effect, we introduce KV-cache swapping and sliding-window attention masking. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed inter-utterance interpolation achieves a 99-100% success rate in gender conversion, up to 36 Hz pitch variation, and up to 1.6 syllables-per-second speed change. Our intra-utterance transition maintains a speaker similarity of 0.81-0.91 and achieves perceptual smoothness scores of 3.48-4.48.

</details>


### [116] [RAG-Coding: Enhancing LLM Medical Coding with Structured External Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27377)
*Yidong Gan,David D. Nguyen,Yang Lin,Peter Zhong,Thanh Vu,Long Duong,Yuan-Fang Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RAG-Coding是一种利用四个大语言模型智能体结合外部知识库（ICD-10-CM编码表和指南）进行自动化ICD编码的方法，在MDACE数据集上相比最优LLM基线方法在micro-F1上提升8-13%，并发布了更新版MDACE-2025数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化ICD-10-CM编码是临床文档中的关键任务，现有方法（包括纯LLM方法和预训练语言模型方法）在编码准确性和临床合规性方面仍有提升空间，尤其是缺乏对外部权威知识源（如官方编码表和指南）的系统性利用。

Method: 提出RAG-Coding智能体方法，协调四个LLM智能体，通过检索和交叉引用外部知识源（官方编码列表和指南）来增强编码决策过程。

Result: 在MDACE数据集上，RAG-Coding在多个LLM骨干上比最优LLM基线micro-F1高8-13%、macro-F1高2-8%；与SOTA预训练方法PLM-ICD相比，micro召回率+11%，但micro精确度-6%，整体F1相当；消融实验验证了外部知识引入的逐步增益。

Conclusion: RAG-Coding通过结合外部知识有效提升了ICD编码准确性，展现了检索增强生成在临床编码任务中的潜力。同时发布的MDACE-2025数据集为未来研究提供了更符合当前临床标准的评估基准。

Abstract: We present RAG-Coding, an agentic method for automated ICD-10-CM coding. RAG-Coding orchestrates four large language model (LLM) agents and grounds their coding decisions in external knowledge sources (e.g. the official coding tabular list and guidelines). By retrieving and cross-referencing relevant knowledge in these sources, the agents enhance coding accuracy and ensure clinical compliance. On the MDACE dataset, RAG-Coding outperforms the best LLM-based baseline by 8-13\% in micro-F1 and 2-8\% in macro-F1 across multiple LLM backbones. Compared to the state-of-the-art pretrained language model method, PLM-ICD, RAG-Coding exhibits higher micro recall (+11\%), while PLM-ICD exhibits higher micro precision (+6\%), yielding comparable micro- and macro-F1. Ablations show stepwise gains, highlighting the importance of incorporating external knowledge. We also release MDACE-2025, updating the original dataset with expert re-annotations with the latest 2025 ICD-10-CM guidelines. This update features more fine-grained code labels and enables evaluation against current clinical standards.

</details>


### [117] [OralAgent: Integrating Reasoning, Tools, and Knowledge for Interactive Dental Image Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27378)
*Jing Hao,Siyuan Dai,Yongxin Zhang,Yuci Liang,Jiamin Wu,Jiahao Bao,Yuxuan Fan,Zanting Ye,Yanpeng Sun,Xinyu Zhang,Ming Hu,Liang Zhan,James Kit Hon Tsoi,Linlin Shen,Junjun He,Kuo Feng Hung*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出首个牙科专用AI智能体OralAgent，整合22种视觉分析工具和368本牙科教科书，实现多模态推理、工具决策与知识检索的端到端自动化框架；同时构建了大规模双语牙科语料库OralCorpus（1.348亿 tokens）和中文选择题基准OralQA-ZH（798题覆盖11个亚专科），在多个基准测试上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有牙科AI模型多为单一任务、独立模态的孤立设计，难以在真实临床工作流中落地应用，缺乏能够统一多模态推理、工具使用和知识检索的集成化AI系统。

Method: 提出OralAgent牙科专用AI智能体，集成22个视觉分析工具和368本经典牙科教科书，实现自主推理、规划、工具调用、知识检索和多步骤工作流执行；构建OralCorpus双语语料库（134.8M tokens）用于检索增强生成（RAG），以及OralQA-ZH中文多选题基准（798题，11个亚专科）。

Result: OralAgent在MMOral-Uni、MMOral-OPG和OralQA-ZH基准上均取得最优（SOTA）性能，展现出在真实临床场景中的有效性、可解释性和适应性。

Conclusion: OralAgent作为首个牙科专用AI智能体，通过统一的多模态推理、工具和知识检索框架，有效解决了现有牙科AI孤立设计的问题，为口腔临床工作流提供了实用、可解释且适应性强的AI解决方案。

Abstract: Dental image analysis plays a pivotal role in supporting accurate diagnosis and treatment planning in oral healthcare. Although recent advances have produced dental AI models for specific tasks and individual imaging modalities, their isolated designs limit practical use in real-world clinical workflows. In this paper, we present OralAgent, the first dental-specialized AI agent that unifies multimodal reasoning, tool-based decision-making, and knowledge-grounded retrieval within an end-to-end automated framework. It integrates 22 visual analysis tools and 368 widely-used classical dental textbooks, enabling autonomous reasoning, planning, tool use, knowledge retrieval, and multi-step workflow execution. Furthermore, we introduce OralCorpus, a large-scale, high-quality bilingual textual resource containing 134.8M tokens curated for dental retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). To evaluate models' multidisciplinary dental knowledge, we construct OralQA-ZH, a Chinese multiple-choice question benchmark consisting of 798 items across eleven oral subspecialties. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OralAgent achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MMOral-Uni, MMOral-OPG, and OralQA-ZH benchmarks, highlighting its effectiveness, interpretability, and adaptability in real-world clinical settings. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/isjinghao/OralAgent.

</details>


### [118] [BioELX: Cross-lingual Biomedical Entity Linking via Alias-based Retrieval and LLM Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27380)
*Yi Wang,Corina Dima,Liangyu Zhong,Steffen Staab*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: BioELX是一个两阶段跨语言生物医学实体链接框架，通过多语言别名增强SapBERT（第一阶段）和利用预训练LLM进行上下文感知消歧（第二阶段），无需标注数据即可在多个基准上达到SOTA，尤其在低资源语言上提升显著（如泰语+30.8 Recall@1）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨语言生物医学实体链接中，专家标注数据成本高昂（尤其低资源语言），且现有SapBERT检索器主要依赖英文别名，对非英文提及泛化差、缺乏上下文感知消歧能力。

Method: 两阶段框架：Stage 1用Wikidata多语言别名扩展SapBERT训练以改善跨语言候选检索；Stage 2用预训练LLM排序器联合考虑提及上下文和候选进行上下文感知消歧，无需监督训练。

Result: 在XL-BEL上平均Recall@1提升+19.2，低资源语言提升尤为显著（土耳其语+21.6，韩语+22.1，泰语+30.8）；EMEA +6.2，Patent +5.4，WikiMed-DE +12.8，达到新SOTA。

Conclusion: BioELX证明了通过多语言别名增强检索和LLM零样本排序可以有效解决跨语言BEL的数据稀缺问题，尤其利好低资源语言场景。

Abstract: Cross-lingual biomedical entity linking (BEL) maps mentions in any language to unique identifiers in a biomedical knowledge base (KB), supporting clinical and biomedical NLP applications. However, expert-annotated training data for BEL are costly, especially for low-resource languages. Moreover, many cross-lingual BEL systems rely on SapBERT-based retrievers trained on predominantly English aliases in the KB, leading to poor generalization to unseen non-English mentions and limited context-aware disambiguation. We propose BioELX, a two-stage cross-lingual BEL framework that requires no task-specific annotated training corpora. In Stage~1, we enrich SapBERT training with Wikidata-derived multilingual aliases and use the resulting retriever to improve cross-lingual candidate retrieval. In Stage~2, we perform context-aware disambiguation with a pre-trained LLM ranker that jointly considers the mention context and candidate, eliminating the need for supervised training. Experiments on five benchmarks (XL-BEL, EMEA, Patent, WikiMed-DE, and MedMentions) show that BioELX achieves new state-of-the-art performance. It improves average Recall@1 on XL-BEL by +19.2, with especially large gains for low-resource languages, e.g., +21.6 on Turkish, +22.1 on Korean, +30.8 on Thai, and delivers consistent improvements on EMEA (+6.2), Patent (+5.4), and WikiMed-DE (+12.8). Code and resources will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [119] [Bridging the Stability-Expressivity Gap: Synthetic Data Scaling and Preference Alignment for Low-Resource Spoken Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27383)
*Yizhong Geng,Yanliang Li,Jinghan Yang,Tianhan Jiang,Boxun An,Ya Li,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示了口语语言模型（SLM）在低资源语言场景下依赖合成数据时存在的“稳定性-表现力缺口”（Stability-Expressivity Gap），并提出两种自对齐框架（DGSA和TDSC）来平衡音素准确性与韵律表现力，在Lao语上首次实现零样本语音克隆。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 口语语言模型（SLM）在低资源语言中受限于转录语音稀缺，合成数据虽能提升音素准确性，但会抑制韵律表现力，导致表现力崩溃（Synthetic Erosion）。现有方法未能有效解决这一根本性权衡问题。

Method: 提出两种自对齐框架：1) DGSA（解耦引导自对齐）利用韵律-音色分离恢复复杂语言的表现力；2) TDSC（温度驱动自批判）通过自动探索与过滤稳定生成，适用于真实参考极其有限的场景。

Result: 所提方法在性能上超越ElevenLabs和Gemini Pro等强商用系统，并在Lao语上首次实现零样本语音克隆。

Conclusion: 通过自对齐框架可以有效弥合合成数据带来的稳定性与表现力之间的缺口，为低资源语言的SLM应用提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Spoken Language Models (SLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for speech synthesis by bypassing explicit grapheme-to-phoneme pipelines. However, their effectiveness in low-resource languages remains fundamentally limited by the scarcity of transcribed speech. In practice, synthetic data has become the primary strategy for scaling SLMs in such settings, providing reliable phonetic supervision when real data is insufficient. In this work, we show that this reliance introduces a fundamental trade-off, which we term the Stability-Expressivity Gap: while synthetic data improves phonetic accuracy, it progressively suppresses prosodic variability, ultimately leading to a collapse of expressivity (Synthetic Erosion). To bridge this gap, we propose two self-alignment frameworks. Disentanglement-Guided Self-Alignment (DGSA) recovers expressivity for complex languages by exploiting prosody-timbre separation. For regimes where authentic references are exceptionally limited, Temperature-Driven Self-Critique (TDSC) stabilizes generation through automated exploration and filtering. Our approach outperforms strong commercial systems, including ElevenLabs and Gemini Pro, and enables the first zero-shot voice cloning capability for Lao.

</details>


### [120] [From AR to Diffusion: Efficiently Adapting Large Language Models with Strictly Causal and Elastic Horizons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27387)
*Xiangyu Ma,Teng Xiao,Zuchao Li,Lefei Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FLUID框架通过严格因果对齐技术，让预训练的自回归模型（如GPT）能直接适配扩散模型，实现高效并行文本生成，避免从头预训练的高昂成本；同时提出弹性视野机制，根据信息密度动态调整去噪步长，在显著降低训练成本的同时达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型虽能实现高效的并行文本生成，但其依赖的双向注意力机制与预训练自回归模型（如GPT）的结构不兼容，导致无法复用AR模型强大的先验知识，不得不从零开始大规模预训练，成本极高。

Method: 1) 严格因果对齐（Strictly Causal Alignment）：强制对齐因果注意力，使得标准GPT风格的检查点可以直接初始化扩散模型；2) 弹性视野（Elastic Horizons）：基于熵的动态机制，根据局部信息密度自适应调整去噪步长，替代固定调度策略。

Result: FLUID在文本生成任务上达到SOTA性能，同时将训练成本降低了数个数量级，有效弥合了AR模型与并行生成之间的鸿沟。

Conclusion: FLUID成功证明了预训练AR模型可作为扩散模型的有效初始化，无需从零预训练，为降低大规模文本扩散模型的训练成本提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Diffusion models promise efficient parallel text generation but rely on bidirectional attention, creating a structural mismatch with pre-trained Autoregressive (AR) models. This incompatibility precludes reusing robust AR priors, necessitating prohibitive pre-training from scratch. To bridge this gap, we propose FLUID, a framework that efficiently adapts AR backbones to the diffusion paradigm. By enforcing Strictly Causal Alignment, FLUID enables seamless initialization from standard GPT-style checkpoints, circumventing the need for massive pre-training. Furthermore, we introduce Elastic Horizons, an entropy-driven mechanism that dynamically modulates denoising strides based on local information density rather than fixed schedules. Experiments demonstrate that FLUID achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing training costs by orders of magnitude, effectively reconciling established AR foundations with efficient parallel generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/Oli-lab-nun/FLUID/tree/main.

</details>


### [121] [Modeling Community Attitude through Reaction Tone: A Human-AI Collaborative Framework for Evaluating LLM Alignment with Linguistic Behaviors in Online Communities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27388)
*Nuan Wen,Xuezhe Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CARE框架，通过评估LLM对真实社区面对新闻事件时的反应模拟，发现存在"现实主义鸿沟"：即使用社区提示词引导，LLM仍无法忠实再现人类社区的"厚描述"社会动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估将社会身份简化为静态标签，忽略了现实社区如何应对社会变迁中的动态反应，导致LLM无法忠实模拟人类社区的"厚描述"。

Method: 提出CARE（社区感知反应评估）框架，以反应为中心，通过人类-AI协作验证，刻画微观的言外之意语调谱系及其背后的态度，对比LLM模拟话语与真实社区对新闻事件的情境化反应。

Result: 发现存在持续的"现实主义鸿沟"：显式社区提示无法本质上提升模拟保真度；不同前沿模型呈现差异化行为特征，表明当前对齐策略不足以捕捉在线群体的社会语言学动态。

Conclusion: 当前LLM的对齐策略在捕捉社会语言学动态方面存在根本性不足，需要超越简单提示工程的新方法来实现可信的社会模拟。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly utilized as proxies for computational social analysis; yet, their ability to faithfully represent the "thick descriptions" (Geertz, 1973) of human communities remains a critical challenge. Current evaluations often reduce social identity to static labels, sidelining how real-world groups navigate social shifts. To bridge this gap, we introduce CARE (Community-Aware Reaction Evaluation), a reaction-centered framework that benchmarks LLM-simulated discourse against the authentic, event-contingent responses of distinct communities to real-world news. By characterizing a fine-grained spectrum of illocutionary tones and the underlying attitudes they manifest--validated through human-AI collaboration--our diagnosis reveals a persistent "realism gap": steering LLMs with explicit community prompts fails to inherently improve simulation fidelity. Analysis further identifies divergent behavioral signatures among frontier models, suggesting that current alignment strategies remain insufficient for capturing the sociolinguistic dynamics of online groups.

</details>


### [122] [EvoSpec: Evolving Speculative Decoding via Real-Time Vocabulary and Parameter AdaptationTarget](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27390)
*Shuyu Zhang,Lingfeng Pan,Qicheng Wang,Yaqi Shi,Yueyang Tan,Ruyu Yan,Jiaqi Chen,Lixing Du,Lu Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: EvoSpec是一个通过动态词汇表和参数自适应实时演化草稿模型的框架，在专业领域（代码、法律、医学）上比静态方法快1.13倍，内存开销降低27%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有投机解码中，输出投影层随词汇表规模扩大成为瓶颈，静态剪枝方法在专业领域或话题切换场景下因无法捕捉动态分布偏移而导致接受率骤降。

Method: 提出EvoSpec框架，包含：1) 基于语义和统计索引的上下文感知机制，检索关键长尾词元；2) 利用课程学习的轻量级在线对齐策略，持续最小化草稿模型与目标模型之间的分布差距。

Result: 在EAGLE-3上，相比最先进的静态基线FR-Spec实现1.13倍加速，内存开销比标准在线适应方法低27%。

Conclusion: EvoSpec通过动态词汇表和参数自适应有效克服了静态方法在专业领域和话题切换场景下的局限性，实现了更高效的投机解码。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model inference via a draft-then-verify paradigm, yet the output projection layer becomes a bottleneck as vocabulary sizes scale. While existing static pruning methods effectively reduce this overhead, they suffer from precipitous drops in acceptance rate in specialized domains or topic-switching scenarios due to their inability to capture dynamic distribution shifts. To address this, we introduce EvoSpec, a framework that enables real-time evolution of the draft model through dynamic vocabulary and parameter adaptation. Unlike static or purely retrieval-based approaches, EvoSpec employs a context-aware mechanism that retrieves critical long-tail tokens via efficient semantic and statistical indexing. Furthermore, we propose a lightweight online alignment strategy utilizing curriculum learning to continually minimize the distributional gap between the draft and target models. Extensive evaluations across specialized domains (coding, law, and medicine) confirm that EvoSpec overcomes the limitations of static baselines. On EAGLE-3, it achieves a 1.13x speedup in these settings over the state-of-the-art static baseline FR-Spec, with 27\% lower memory overhead than standard online adaptation.

</details>


### [123] [StoryMI: Steerable Multi-Agent Therapeutic Dialogue Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27393)
*Qingyu Meng,Min Chen,Dingming Liu,Yifan Mo,Yue Su,Xin Sun,Koen Hindriks,Jiahuan Pei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: StoryMI 是一个多LLM智能体框架，通过情境化故事和交互智能体动态控制，生成符合动机性访谈编码标准的心理治疗对话，实验表明该方法能提升临床合理性与MI依从性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM对话生成缺乏情境 grounding、动态策略控制以及与临床标准对齐的评估方法，无法满足动机性访谈（MI）的临床需求。

Method: 提出StoryMI多智能体框架：(1) 基于问卷构建客户画像并扩展为情境故事；(2) 治疗师和客户智能体生成带MI编码的话语；(3) 交互智能体动态协调MI策略。同时设计了两级评估协议（词汇指标+MI特定指标）。

Result: 构建了6K条模拟MI对话数据集（覆盖12种MI代码和13个症状领域），对6种开源/闭源LLM进行基准测试。结果表明情境 grounding 和宏观策略控制能提升MI依从性和临床合理性。

Conclusion: 结构化多智能体工作流能有效生成心理治疗对话，为提升LLM在临床场景中的可控性和可信度提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate fluent dialogue, but prior works lack situational grounding, dynamic strategy control, and evaluation aligned with clinical standards in motivational interviewing (MI). We introduce StoryMI, a multi-LLM agent framework for controllable MI dialogue generation, where questionnaire-based client profiles are expanded into situational stories that provide narrative context for the dialogue. Therapist and client agents generate MI-coded utterances guided by MI codes selected by the interaction agent, while an interaction agent dynamically coordinates exchanges to control MI strategies during a multi-turn conversation. We propose a two-level evaluation protocol: lexical metrics and MI-specific measures of macro-level counseling strategies, alongside LLM-as-judge and human expert assessments. We construct a dataset of 6K simulated MI dialogues grounded in 1K questionnaire-story pairs, covering 12 MI codes and 13 symptom domains, and benchmark six open- and closed-source LLMs. Our results show that situational grounding and macro-level control can improve MI adherence and clinical plausibility, demonstrating the effectiveness of a structured multi-agent workflow for psychotherapy dialogue generation. We provide code and data for reproducibility.

</details>


### [124] [LegalGraphRAG: Multi-Agent Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Reliable Legal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28120)
*Zerui Chen,Qinggang Zhang,Zhishang Xiang,Zhimin Wei,Linfeng Gao,Xiao Huang,Zhihong Zhang,Jinsong Su*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LegalGraphRAG是一个面向法律推理的框架，通过层级法律图组织异构法律知识，并结合多智能体系统（研究者、审核者、裁决者）实现可验证、可信赖的法律推理，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GraphRAG在处理法律领域时面临两大挑战：(1) 法律语料异构且包含多粒度知识（事实、规则、抽象原则），平面知识图谱无法有效区分；(2) 传统RAG直接将检索内容传递给LLM，缺乏验证机制，导致不透明且易错的推理。

Method: 提出LegalGraphRAG框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 层级法律图——分层组织法律来源（案件、法条、解释），支持在合适的抽象层级进行检索；(2) 多智能体推理系统——研究者(Researcher)检索候选证据，审核者(Auditor)严格验证证据与源文件的一致性，裁决者(Adjudicator)综合已验证证据做出最终判决。

Result: 大量实验表明，LegalGraphRAG在准确性和可信赖性上达到SOTA，优于现有GraphRAG基线方法。

Conclusion: 层级知识图谱与多智能体验证机制的结合，能有效提升法律领域检索增强生成的可信度与准确性。

Abstract: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) advances flat document retrieval by structuring knowledge as relational graphs, enabling more coherent and effective reasoning. However, applying it to specific domains like legal reasoning faces critical challenges. (i) Legal corpora are heterogeneous, containing multi-granular knowledge from cases, articles and interpretations. A flat knowledge graph cannot adequately differentiate between factual details, applied rules, and abstract principles, limiting accurate retrieval. (ii) Reliable legal judgment demands transparent, evidence-based reasoning. Traditional RAG passes retrieved context directly to an LLM without verification, resulting in opaque, error-prone reasoning. To this end, we propose LegalGraphRAG, a framework designed for reliable legal reasoning. Our approach introduces two core components: a hierarchical legal graph that hierarchically organizes legal sources to enable retrieval at appropriate abstraction levels, and a multi-agent system for reliable legal reasoning, where a Researcher retrieves candidate evidence, an Auditor rigorously verifies its validity against source documents, and an Adjudicator synthesizes the set of verified evidence to render a final judgment. Extensive experiments show that LegalGraphRAG achieves the state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing GraphRAG baselines in accurate and trustworthy legal analysis. Our code, datasets and implementation details are available at https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/LegalGraphRAG.

</details>


### [125] [Debate Helps Weak Judges Reward Stronger Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27483)
*Ethan Elasky,Frank Nakasako,Naman Goyal*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 辩论作为可扩展监督协议的效果好坏取决于评判者是否将批评者的言论视为待验证的主张而非待总结的证词；当批评者的分类能力超过评判者时，辩论显著优于咨询基线，但若两者能力相当则无效；省略反驳回合不会降低性能，单次独立批评即可获得大部分收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 辩论作为可扩展监督协议在理论上很有前景，但实证结果参差不齐，尤其是当评判者缺乏隐藏信息时效果不明显。作者希望系统研究在强辩手/弱评判者设定下，辩论何时能真正帮助提升监督效果。

Method: 在可程序验证的代码和逻辑任务上，采用提议者-批评者辩论范式，比较辩论与咨询基线；同时通过消融实验（移除反驳回合）检验辩论各组成部分的贡献，并分析批评者与评判者的能力差距对效果的影响。

Result: 在五组配对中，当批评者分类能力超过评判者时（三组），辩论效果显著优于咨询；当两者能力相当（两组），辩论产生零效应，且评判者验证率下降数十个百分点。移除反驳回合未降低评判者表现。

Conclusion: 辩论的效果取决于两个条件：批评者能力超过评判者，且评判者将批评视为待验证的主张。单次独立批评（而非完整辩论）能以更低成本获得大部分收益。这为可验证领域的可扩展监督提供了一种更廉价的原型：回答-批评-评判流程，以及一个可预测辩论效果的部署前审计方法。

Abstract: Despite theoretical promise, debate as a scalable oversight protocol has produced mixed empirical results: gains in some settings, and null effects in others, especially when the judge does not have information hidden from it. We study proposer-critic debate in a stronger-debater/weaker-judge setting on programmatically verifiable code and logic tasks. Debate helps the judge over a consultancy baseline when the critic provides a usable advantage: the critic's classification ability must exceed the judge's, and the judge must treat critic speeches as claims to verify rather than testimony to summarize.
  On the three of five pairings where the condition holds, proposer-critic debate's gains are statistically significant over consultancy, and these pairings are the most capable model pairings. On the two non-responder pairings in our set, debate produces null effects, and judge verification rates drop by tens of percentage points once a critic enters the transcript. In these cases the critic's binary-classification ability and the judge's are within noise of each other, and the critic's disagreement is parsed as testimony rather than a claim to check.
  Ablating rebuttal rounds from debate produces no measurable change in judge performance: a single independent critique recovers the bulk of debate's benefit at lower inference cost. These findings suggest a cheaper primitive for training-free scalable oversight in verifiable domains (answer, critique, judge) and a pre-deployment audit (does the critic beat the judge, and will the judge verify it?) that predicts when debate will help.

</details>


### [126] [PAST2HARM: A Simple Adaptive Past Tense Attack for Jailbreaking Multimodal AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27545)
*Snehasis Mukhopadhyay*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PAST2HARM框架，利用过去时态改写策略系统性地攻破了多模态文生图模型的拒绝训练防线，在三个模型上实现了67%-100%的攻击成功率，并生成了包括色情、虚假信息、仇恨言论在内的多种有害内容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态AI系统的越狱攻击研究不足，而不安全图像生成的后果比不安全文本更为严重，且现有防御手段相对不成熟。

Method: 提出PAST2HARM框架，利用过去时态改写绕过安全防护。攻击沿两个维度展开：广度上通过时间深化逐步增强历史锚定和档案线索，侵蚀拒绝边界；深度上通过迭代升级在初始合规后探索有害生成的上限，并利用语言模型作为裁判评估危害严重性。

Result: 在Gemini Nano Banana Pro、GPT Image 2和SD XL上分别实现83%、67%和100%的黑盒攻击成功率；跨模型迁移成功率超过50%；生成了包括色情内容、政治虚假信息、历史否认叙事、仇恨言论和自我伤害美化在内的多种有害输出。

Conclusion: 当前多模态AI系统的安全防护存在根本性脆弱性，亟需更强大的多模态安全训练。

Abstract: Jailbreak attacks on multimodal AI systems remain underexplored, even though unsafe image generation can have more severe consequences than unsafe text and current defenses are relatively immature. We introduce PAST2HARM, a simple yet effective adaptive jailbreak framework that bypasses refusal training in state of the art multimodal text to image models. Building on prior findings that past tense reformulations can evade safeguards, PAST2HARM systematically exploits this vulnerability in multimodal generative AI.
  We characterize the attack along two dimensions. First, breadth: through temporal deepening, the framework incrementally strengthens historical anchoring and archival cues, eroding refusal boundaries across models with varying alignment strength. Second, depth: via iterative escalation after initial compliance, we probe the upper bound of harmful generation, measuring severity using a scalar severity jailbreak metric evaluated by a language model acting as a judge. We find that mid conversation turns form peak vulnerability windows, where harmfulness increases before plateauing and eventually undergoing semantic inversion.
  We evaluate PAST2HARM on three models Gemini Nano Banana Pro, GPT Image 2, and SD XL achieving attack success rates of 83 percent, 67 percent, and 100 percent in a black box, gradient free setting. Adversarial prompts also transfer across models, with cross model success rates above 50 percent. The attack elicits diverse harmful outputs, including explicit sexual content, political disinformation, historical denial narratives, hate speech, and self harm glorification. We further release a curated benchmark of prompts, reformulations, and outputs as a resource for red teaming and alignment. Our results expose fundamental brittleness in current safeguards and highlight the need for stronger multimodal safety training.

</details>


### [127] [Keyphrase Generative Representation of Youth Crisis Conversations Beyond Static Taxonomies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27546)
*Abeer Badawi,Will Aitken,Lydia Sequeira,Jocelyn Rankin,Maia Norman,Elham Dolatabadi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文分析了703,975条青少年求助短信，将19标签分类体系扩展为39标签层级体系，并提出Keyphrase Generative Representation (KGR)方法——通过受约束的LLM生成对话特定的关键短语。KGR在129条对话和387个专家标注上评估，扩展分类准确率达0.96，81%的关键短语准确反映内容，并将主题检索准确率从0.25提升至0.70。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 青少年心理 distress 越来越多地通过不断演变和上下文相关的语言表达，传统的固定标签分类体系难以捕捉这些新兴且文化特定的模式，需要更灵活、可解释的表征方法。

Method: 1) 将Kids Help Phone原有的19标签问题分类扩展为39标签层级分类体系；2) 提出Keyphrase Generative Representation (KGR)，使用受约束的LLM生成简洁、对话特定的关键短语；3) 通过129条对话和387个专家标注进行评估。

Result: 扩展分类体系达到专家共识可靠性，准确率0.96；81%的关键短语准确反映内容，74%提升清晰度；KGR发现了固定分类中缺失的身份相关主题（如移民问题、照顾者负担）；主题检索准确率从人工分析的0.25提升至0.70（+0.45）。

Conclusion: KGR标志着向混合、可解释的生成式表征的转变，能够超越静态分类体系，揭示青少年 distress 中新兴且文化根基深厚的模式，为危机响应提供更灵活的支持。

Abstract: Crisis Responders (CRs) rapidly assess thousands of youth SMS conversations each year to identify mental health concerns and guide support. Yet youth distress is increasingly expressed through evolving and context-specific language that often does not fit fixed-label taxonomies. This work analyzed 703,975 de-identified Kids Help Phone conversations (2018-2023) and expanded KHP's 19-label issue taxonomy into a 39-label hierarchical schema. We then introduce Keyphrase Generative Representation (KGR), a constrained LLM generating concise, conversation-specific keyphrases, evaluated across 129 conversations and 387 expert annotations. The expanded taxonomy achieved expert consensus reliability, with an accuracy of 0.96, and expert review found that 81% of keyphrases accurately reflected content and 74% improved clarity. KGR surfaced identity-linked themes absent from the fixed taxonomy, including immigration problems and caregiver burden, and supported a topic-retrieval workflow that increased accuracy from 0.25 to 0.70 (+0.45) over the manual analyst process. KGR marks a shift toward hybrid, interpretable generative representations that extend crisis response beyond static taxonomies to surface emerging and culturally grounded patterns of youth distress.

</details>


### [128] [Rethinking Memory as Continuously Evolving Connectivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28773)
*Jizhan Fang,Buqiang Xu,Zhixian Wang,Haoliang Cao,Xinle Deng,Baohua Dong,Hangcheng Zhu,Ruohui Huang,Gang Yu,Ying Wei,Guozhou Zheng,Feiyu Xiong,Haofen Wang,Huajun Chen,Ningyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FluxMem提出了一种连接演化的记忆框架，将记忆建模为异构图，并通过初始连接形成、反馈驱动优化和长期巩固三个阶段动态调整记忆拓扑，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有记忆增强型LLM代理将记忆视为静态仓库，使用预定义表示和固定检索管道，无法适应动态环境中反馈、任务变化和异构信号对记忆的持续重塑需求。

Method: 将记忆建模为异构图，通过三个阶段（初始连接形成、反馈驱动优化、长期巩固）渐进优化拓扑结构；修复缺失链接、修剪干扰、对齐抽象粒度、将成功轨迹蒸馏为可复用的程序化回路；使用记忆泛化性和进化成熟度指标引导优化。

Result: 在LoCoMo、Mind2Web和GAIA三个不同基准上取得一致的SOTA性能，展现出在复杂代理环境中的强适应性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: FluxMem通过动态演化的记忆图结构有效克服了静态记忆的局限性，为LLM代理在动态环境中的长期记忆管理提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Existing memory-augmented LLM agents often treat memory as a static repository with pre-defined representations and fixed retrieval pipelines, which is brittle in dynamic agentic environments where feedback, task variation, and heterogeneous signals continuously reshape what should be remembered and how it should be connected. To address this, we propose FluxMem, a connectivity-evolving memory framework that models memory as a heterogeneous graph and progressively refines its topology through three stages: initial connection formation, feedback-driven refinement, and long-term consolidation. During execution, FluxMem repairs missing links, prunes interference, aligns abstraction granularity, and distills recurrent successful trajectories into reusable procedural circuits, guided by one metric for memory generalizability and evolutionary maturity. Across three fundamentally distinct benchmarks including LoCoMo, Mind2Web, and GAIA, FluxMem achieves consistent state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating strong adaptation and generalization in complex agentic environments. The code will be open-sourced in https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem.

</details>


### [129] [The Future of Facts: Tracing the Factual Generation-Verification Gap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27564)
*Tim R. Davidson,Anja Surina,Caglar Gulcehre*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了语言模型中事实知识的生成与验证之间的差距（GV-gap），发现验证能力总是先于生成能力习得，验证比生成更稳定，且事实更新可能导致模型同时验证新旧答案的“多宇宙”状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管语言模型已广泛用于事实知识检索，但其生成与验证能力之间存在差距（GV-gap），这一动态在事实知识领域尚未被充分理解。作者希望区分事实性GV-gap与其他类型的差距，并探究其背后的训练机制。

Method: 使用四种开源模型系列（每种两个规模），追踪三种训练阶段（获取、持续学习、更新）中生成与验证能力的变化。同时，在更大的前沿模型上进行自然实验以验证扩展性。

Result: 三个主要发现：(i) 验证能力始终先于生成能力习得；(ii) 验证比生成对持续学习更鲁棒；(iii) 事实更新可能导致模型处于“多宇宙”状态，同时验证新旧答案。前沿模型实验也复现了这些动态，并揭示了在充分覆盖事实上的残留验证偏差。

Conclusion: 事实知识领域存在系统性的生成-验证差距，其动态规律可跨模型规模复现，这为理解语言模型的知识表示与自我改进机制提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Language models are becoming the default interface to factual knowledge, yet they often verify outputs more reliably than they generate them. This generation-verification gap (GV-gap) underlies many recent advances in self-improvement and reasoning, but its dynamics on factual knowledge specifically remain poorly understood. We focus on the training mechanisms underlying factual GV-gaps, distinguishing them from their computational and aesthetic counterparts. We trace generation and verification capabilities through three training phases (acquisition, continual learning, and updating) across four open-source model families at two scales each. Three findings recur across models: (i) verification is consistently learned before generation; (ii) verification is more robust to continual learning than generation; and (iii) factual updates can leave models in a "multi-verse" state, simultaneously verifying both old and new answers as correct. Natural experiments on frontier models reproduce these dynamics at scale and reveal residual verification biases on well-covered facts.

</details>


### [130] [Can Hallucinations Be Useful? Solving Multi-Hop Questions With SLMs By Chaining System-I/II Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27596)
*Saptarshi Sengupta,Suhang Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种"先回答后推理"的反向策略框架，通过结合System-I（零样本快速回答）和System-II（基于检索证据的深度思考），有效提升了小语言模型在多步推理问答任务上的表现，优于传统的"先思考后检索"方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小语言模型（SLMs）虽然速度快、硬件需求低，但比大语言模型更易产生幻觉，尤其是在多步推理任务中，早期错误会级联放大。现有工作采用"先思考后迭代检索"策略来减少幻觉，但本文发现：SLMs对初始答案往往是准确自信的，且幻觉有时反而有助于找到正确答案，因此质疑了"先思考"策略的必要性。

Method: 提出一种认知启发的框架，反转传统策略为"先回答后推理"：首先允许模型零样本快速给出初始答案（System-I），然后基于该初始假设从知识源检索证据，再进入更深层次推理（System-II）来验证或修正答案。

Result: 在多个多步问答基准上，该方法优于采用传统"先思考后检索"路线的现有工作。

Conclusion: "先回答后推理"的策略比"先思考后检索"更有效，因为SLMs的初始答案通常可靠，且中间的"幻觉"（即初始假设）可以作为探索正确答案的起点，而非单纯需要避免的错误。

Abstract: Recently, there has been increased interest in Small Language Models (SLMs), which are fast, show good performance, and have lower hardware demands than large language models (LLMs). However, SLMs hallucinate more frequently than LLMs, impacting their ability to solve complex multi-step reasoning problems as early mistakes cascade to the final response. To address this, existing works think-first followed by iterative retrieval to reduce hallucination. We argue that the think-first strategy is not always necessary as we find that: (i) SLMs are often accurately confident in their initial answer and, (ii) hallucinations can actually be beneficial for honing in on the true answer. As such, we position our work as an inversion of this strategy, i.e., answer first-reason later. We propose a cognitively-inspired framework where the model is first allowed to quickly answer the question (System-I (zero-shot)) and then resorts to deeper thinking (System-II) based on evidence retrieved from a knowledge source using the initial hypothesis. By combining System-I and System-II style thinking, we show that our method can outperform prior work that takes the traditional think-first route on various multi-step question-answering benchmarks.

</details>


### [131] [Simorgh at SemEval-2026 task 7: Region-Aware Hybrid Retrieval for Low-Resource Cultural Reasoning in Multilingual Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27636)
*Hadi Bayrami Asl Tekanlou,Mahdi Bakhtiyarzadeh,Jafar Razmara*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了多语言文化知识问答问题，提出了一种结合BM25词法匹配和稠密语义相似度的区域感知混合检索方法，配合Qwen3-14B量化模型进行回答。实验表明该方法相比纯参数推理在跨语言稳定性上有所提升，但存在数据不平衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在通用推理任务上表现优异，但在低资源语言和文化特定知识方面存在挑战。需要一种能够处理多语言文化知识问答的方法。

Method: 使用BLEnD基准数据集（30种语言，涵盖饮食、体育、家庭等文化领域），提出区域感知混合检索方法，结合BM25词法匹配和稠密语义相似度，加入区域加权启发式策略，检索文档构建结构化提示输入给Qwen3-14B量化模型，采用基于logit的确定性答案选择。

Result: 混合检索方法在跨语言稳定性上优于纯参数推理，但不同语言间仍存在显著性能差距，数据丰富的语言表现优于数据稀缺的语言。

Conclusion: 检索增强方法无法完全克服训练数据不平衡问题，低资源语言的性能瓶颈依然存在，需要进一步研究来解决这一挑战。

Abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate excellent capabilities and performance for general reasoning tasks within the general public domain, they may face challenges with culturally grounded knowledge within languages with limited digital and textual data. In this paper, we investigate culturally grounded multiple-choice question answering with the BLEnD benchmark, which consists of a multilingual corpus of 30 languages and covers various socio-cultural domains, such as cuisine, sports, family, etc. We propose a region-aware hybrid retrieval approach that combines BM25 lexical matching and dense semantic similarity with regional weighting heuristics to improve the relevance of the answer. The retrieved documents are used to construct a structured prompt for the Qwen3-14B quantized model with logit-based deterministic answer selection. The experimental results show improvements to cross-lingual stability with the hybrid retrieval approach over pure parametric inference for culturally grounded question answering. However, there are still notable performance gaps between languages with more and less training data. This shows that the limitations of the retrieval augmentation approach are not entirely overcome by the training data imbalance problem.

</details>


### [132] [Learning to Translate from Soft to Hard LLM Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27642)
*Pitipat Kongsomjit,Suryansh Goyal,Jacob Whitehill*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出将软提示（soft prompts）翻译为自然语言的模型，在保持参数效率的同时提升可解释性，并发现翻译后的文本提示在大型闭源模型上性能优于原始软提示甚至少样本学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软提示调优虽参数高效但缺乏可解释性，现有训练无关的翻译方法（如InSPEcT）质量有限。

Method: 训练一个专用的软提示到自然语言的翻译模型，在多个数据集（DoDs）上进行定性和定量评估。

Result: 翻译模型生成的表述流畅、准确，优于InSPEcT等训练无关方法；且翻译后的文本提示在大型闭源API模型上表现超过原始软提示，甚至优于少样本学习。

Conclusion: 软提示翻译不仅提升可解释性，还开辟了新的下游应用：小模型优化的软提示可转化为便携文本提示，部署在大模型上取得更优效果。

Abstract: Soft prompt tuning is a parameter-efficient method for adapting LLMs to specific tasks, but suffers from a lack of interpretability. Building on recent work on interpreting soft prompts (Ramati et al., 2024), we explore how training a dedicated soft prompt to natural language translation model can yield higher translation quality. In particular, in both quantitative and qualitative comparisons on multiple Datasets of Datasets (DoDs), we demonstrate that our translator produces fluent, accurate verbalizations that outperforms existing training-free methods like InSPEcT. In addition to advancing interpretability, our work suggests a promising downstream application: soft prompts optimized on small, open-source models can be translated into portable text prompts that, when deployed on larger closed-API models, exceed the performance of the original soft prompt and, in some cases, even few-shot learning.

</details>


### [133] [Disentangling Language Roles in Multilingual LLM Task Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27649)
*Qishi Zhan,Minxuan Hu,Seoyeon Jang,Lei Zhao,Ziheng Chen,Man Liang,Xinyue Xiang,Jiaxin Liu,Guansu Wang,Liang He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出MTM-Bench基准，通过完全交叉设计（指令语言、内容语言、响应语言的三元组）系统评估多语言LLM的任务执行能力，发现响应语言角色是性能下降的主导因素，且不匹配数量并非单调预测指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准很少在完全交叉设计中隔离指令语言、源内容语言和响应语言这三个角色，无法系统揭示多语言LLM在跨语言任务中的失败模式。

Method: 构建MTM-Bench基准，枚举英语、西班牙语、中文的所有27种三元组组合，包含语义反转、最终状态提取、语言纯度与更新实现三类任务，使用分解指标（语义正确性、目标语言遵循、约束满足等）评估20个前沿和开源LLM。

Result: 响应语言角色是性能变化的主导轴；单个响应插槽不匹配造成大部分性能下降；不匹配数量并非单调预测难度；不同任务族通过不同渠道失败。

Conclusion: 完全交叉设计揭示了语言角色在任务结构中的组织性影响，语义正确性本身不足以捕捉可靠的多语言任务执行能力。

Abstract: Multilingual LLMs are increasingly used when instruction, source content, and required response languages do not coincide. Existing benchmarks have expanded multilingual instruction-following evaluation, but they rarely isolate these three roles within a fully crossed design. We introduce MTM-Bench, a controlled benchmark for language-conditioned task execution in which each instance is defined by a triplet \((L_{\text{instr}}, L_{\text{content}}, L_{\text{resp}})\). Across English, Spanish, and Chinese, MTM-Bench enumerates all 27 triplets and contains 2{,}430 instances per model across semantic reversal, final-state extraction, and language purity with update realization. We evaluate 20 frontier and open-weight LLMs using decomposed metrics for semantic correctness, target-language adherence, constraint satisfaction, contamination ratio, and joint success, with scoring validated by a targeted human audit. The fully crossed design reveals that degradation is organized by the role a language occupies in the task structure, not merely by mismatch count. The response-language role is the dominant axis of variation, and a single response-slot mismatch accounts for most degradation. The response-only and full-mismatch comparison suggests that mismatch count is not a monotonic predictor of difficulty, with model-level ordering varying across systems. Task families fail through distinct channels, showing that semantic correctness alone does not capture reliable multilingual task execution.

</details>


### [134] [Cultural Fidelity in English-to-Hindi Translation: A Preservation-Fluency Frontier for Gender Recoverability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27654)
*Samyak Savi,Chavi Gupta,Shreyas Gantayet,Tanay Sodha,Dhruv Kumar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了英译中系统在性别信息保真度上的表现，发现现有系统经常通过格标记和敬语结构消除性别信息。作者提出了两种推理时干预方法：SAR（源句感知重排序器）和PAR（现象感知重排序器）。PAR在GPT-4o-mini和Sarvam上分别将目标子集准确率从11.07%提升至54.47%、从15.99%提升至49.66%，人类评估显示性别保留率从10.3%提升至81.3%，但流畅度从4.36下降至3.37。研究表明文化翻译需要在保真度、流畅度和风格自然性之间做出明确权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器翻译不仅是语言转换，更是文化技术。英语明确编码性别信息时，翻译到印地语（一种语法性别系统不同的语言）应该保留性别信息的可恢复性，但现有生成系统频繁丢失这一关键文化线索。

Method: 构建了一个包含37,345个实例、覆盖12个类别的基准测试集。提出两种机制感知的推理时干预：1）SAR（源句感知重排序器），优先选择避免性别中性化句法的候选翻译；2）PAR（现象感知重排序器），即使在格标记语法存在时也通过目标性词汇标记保留性别信息。

Result: PAR在GPT-4o-mini上目标子集准确率从11.07%提升至54.47%，在Sarvam上从15.99%提升至49.66%。人类评估显示性别保留率从10.3%提升至81.3%，但流畅度平均分从4.36降至3.37。

Conclusion: 两种干预措施（SAR和PAR）并非某一方绝对占优，而是处于保真度与流畅度之间的权衡前沿。文化特定场景下的生成任务需要在保真度、流畅度和风格自然性之间做出明确取舍。

Abstract: Generative translation systems are cultural technologies because they decide how socially meaningful cues are rendered within culturally specific grammatical systems. We study one concrete notion of successful cultural translation: when an English source explicitly encodes gender, an English-to-Hindi translation should preserve the recoverability of that cue unless the source itself is ambiguous. We evaluate this criterion on a 37,345-instance benchmark spanning twelve categories and show that five systems frequently erase gender through ergative and honorific constructions. We then introduce two mechanism-aware inference-time interventions. The first, the Source-Aware Reranker (SAR), prefers candidates that avoid gender-neutralizing syntax. The second, the Phenomenon-Aware Reranker (PAR), preserves gender through targeted lexical marking even when ergative syntax remains. Across GPT-4o-mini and Sarvam, PAR improves target-subset accuracy from 11.07% to 54.47% and from 15.99% to 49.66%, respectively. Human evaluation shows that PAR increases gender preservation from 10.3% to 81.3%, but reduces mean fluency from 4.36 to 3.37. These findings place the two interventions on a preservation and fluency frontier rather than supporting a single dominant solution, and show how culturally situated generation can require explicit tradeoffs among fidelity, fluency, and stylistic naturalness.

</details>


### [135] [TRACES: Proactive Safety Auditing for Multi-Turn LLM Agents via Trajectory-State Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27690)
*Jiaqian Li,Yanshu Li,Boxuan Zhang,Ruixiang Tang,Kuan-Hao Huang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出TRACES，一种基于表示的主动审计方法，通过观察LLM的隐藏表征学习轨迹前缀级风险状态，实现代理行为的事中风险预警。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理在多轮工具使用中，安全风险常在中途步骤就已显现，但事后审计（反应式审计）无法在风险发生时及时预警。

Method: 从观察LLM的隐藏表示中诱导出潜在机制特征，建模其时序演化，以估计部分轨迹是否偏离安全方向；利用弱轨迹级监督训练，产出密集的前缀级风险估计。

Result: 在多个代理安全基准上，TRACES在完整轨迹安全预测和主动风险判别上均取得提升。

Conclusion: 风险状态可用于训练更安全的代理，表明了主动审计在长程代理安全中的广阔潜力。

Abstract: LLM agents increasingly operate through multi-turn tool use and environment interaction, where safety risks often emerge from intermediate steps long before they surface in the final outcome. Reactive auditing is therefore insufficient: post-hoc diagnosis frequently misses the chance to flag risks while they are unfolding. We propose TRACES, a representation-based proactive auditor that learns prefix-level trajectory risk states from the hidden representations of an observer LLM. TRACES induces latent mechanism features from step representations and models their temporal evolution to estimate whether a partial trajectory is drifting toward unsafe behavior. To sidestep the cost and ambiguity of step-level risk annotation, TRACES is trained with weak trajectory-level supervision while still producing dense prefix-level risk estimates. Across multiple agent safety benchmarks, TRACES improves both full-trajectory safety prediction and proactive risk discrimination. Our analyses further suggest that these risk states can help train a safer agent, highlighting the broader potential of proactive auditing for long-horizon agent safety.

</details>


### [136] [Chain-based Adaptive Reconfiguration Over Lattices for Hallucination Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27706)
*Joan Vendrell Gallart,Solmaz Kia,Russell Bent,Michael Grosskopf*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CAROL是一个概率框架，通过在格状文本序列上定义语义不确定性度量和马尔可夫链接受-拒绝过程，在测试时减少大语言模型的幻觉，无需依赖词元级不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有幻觉缓解方法多依赖词元级不确定性或检索增强，缺乏对语义一致性的直接建模，且检测与缓解模块分离，效率低、可解释性差。

Method: 提出语义不确定性度量（基于生成响应与可信上下文的一致性），将其建模为字符串子模目标函数，并设计马尔可夫链接受-拒绝过程在文本序列格上迭代优化，具备收敛性和近最优性保证。

Result: 在问答和多智能体推理基准上，相比基于似然和检索增强的基线，CAROL显著减少幻觉，提升可靠性和可解释性，同时保持有竞争力的计算效率。

Conclusion: CAROL将幻觉检测与缓解统一在语义层面的单一框架中，为LLM可靠性提升提供了理论上有保障且实用的新范式。

Abstract: We introduce CAROL (Chain-based Adaptive Reconfiguration Over Lattices), a probabilistic framework for test-time hallucination reduction in large language models. Rather than relying on token-level uncertainty, CAROL defines a semantic uncertainty measure based on the consistency between generated responses and a trusted context, inducing a string-submodular objective over a lattice of textual sequences. This formulation enables hallucination mitigation to be cast as a Markov chain accept-reject process with provable convergence and near-optimality guarantees, allowing the model to iteratively refine outputs toward semantic consistency. By operating at the level of meaning, CAROL unifies hallucination detection and mitigation within a single framework. Empirical results on question answering and multi-agent reasoning benchmarks show that CAROL significantly reduces hallucinations and improves reliability and interpretability compared to likelihood-based and retrieval-augmented baselines, while maintaining competitive computational efficiency.

</details>


### [137] [ReverseMath: Answer Inversion for Scalable and Verifiable Mathematical Problem Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27709)
*Raoyuan Zhao,Yihong Liu,Yupei Du,Hinrich Schütze,Michael A. Hedderich*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ReverseMath方法，通过反转问题与答案的输入-输出关系，自动生成新的数学问题。该方法既能作为评估工具揭露模型的记忆行为，也能作为训练数据增强强化学习，提升数学推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数学推理基准多为静态、重复暴露的，难以区分模型的真正推理与记忆行为；而手动构造新的数学问题成本高昂。

Method: ReverseMath：在原问题中掩码一个数值，将原答案作为已知条件，重写问题使掩码值成为新答案，从而反转输入-输出关系，生成答案已知的新问题。

Result: 评估方面：原问题与反转问题配对揭示了模型行为差异，模型可能在反转问题上失败甚至输出原答案，暗示记忆行为；训练方面：包含ReverseMath生成数据的强化学习提升了多个数学推理基准的表现。

Conclusion: ReverseMath既可作为分析工具揭示模型的记忆倾向，也可作为可验证训练数据的可扩展来源，具有双重价值。

Abstract: Mathematical reasoning benchmarks are vital for evaluating large language models (LLMs), but many are static and repeatedly exposed through public evaluation and training pipelines, making it difficult to separate genuine reasoning from memorization. Meanwhile, manually constructing new math problems with reliable answers remains costly. We introduce ReverseMath, a scalable method for generating new math problems through answer inversion. Given a problem and its answer, ReverseMath masks a numerical value in the original problem, treats the original answer as a known condition, and rewrites the problem so that the masked value becomes the new answer. The generated problem reverses the original input-output relation, making its answer known by construction. We study ReverseMath for both evaluation and training. For evaluation, paired original/reversed problems reveal substantial behavioral shifts: models sometimes fail on reversed problems and even incorrectly output the original answer, suggesting memorization-like behavior. For training, ReverseMath provides automatically labeled reversed problems as data augmentation for reinforcement learning (RL). Experiments show that including ReverseMath-generated data improves mathematical reasoning performance across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating its value as both an analysis tool and a scalable source of verifiable training data.

</details>


### [138] [Beyond Input Understanding: Diagnosing Multilingual Mathematical Reasoning with Directed Acyclic Trace Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27715)
*Jiaqiao Zhang,Zhoujun Li,Raoyuan Zhao,Jian Lan,Thomas Seidl,Michael A. Hedderich,Hinrich Schütze,Yihong Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现大型推理模型在非英语语言中表现不佳不仅是因为理解问题，更在于推理执行过程本身受语言影响。作者提出DATG框架（有向无环迹线图）来对齐不同语言的推理迹线，并设计了Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry两种测试时控制方法，在Qwen3系列上验证了对低资源语言推理性能的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示大型推理模型在非英语语言中数学推理能力下降的真正原因——不仅是语言理解问题，更是推理执行本身受到语言影响，并据此提出诊断和修复方法。

Method: 提出DATG（有向无环迹线图）框架，将推理迹线映射到语言无关的数学锚点和依赖关系上，通过比对目标语言迹线与参考DAG来评估锚点覆盖、依赖保真度和有害数学动作。并设计Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry两种测试时控制策略。

Result: 在Qwen3系列模型上跨12种语言的实验表明，非英语推理（尤其是低资源语言）存在锚点覆盖不足和依赖保真度低的问题；所提出的两种测试时控制方法能持续改进低资源语言的推理表现。

Conclusion: 非英语语言推理缺陷不仅源于理解失败，更源于推理执行中的结构性问题；DATG框架能有效诊断这些缺陷，Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry提供了简单的缓解手段。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong mathematical reasoning performance in English, but remain much less reliable in many low- and medium-resource languages. This gap is often explained as a failure to understand non-English problem statements. We show that this view is incomplete: even when the problem is given in English, controlling the model's reasoning language can substantially reduce accuracy, suggesting that language also affects reasoning execution itself. To study this effect, we introduce DATG, a Directed Acyclic Trace Graph framework that maps reasoning traces to language-independent mathematical anchors and dependencies. This allows us to align target-language traces with reference DAGs and measure whether they cover required mathematical nodes, respect dependency edges, and avoid harmful mathematical actions. Experiments on the Qwen3 series across 12 languages show that non-English reasoning often suffers from reduced anchor coverage and weaker dependency fidelity, especially in low-resource languages. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Loop-Retry and Formula-Retry, two simple test-time controls targeting DATG-exposed failure modes, and show that they consistently improve target-language reasoning performance in low-resource languages.

</details>


### [139] [UserHarness: Harnessing User Minds for Stronger Agent Theory-of-Mind](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27721)
*Cheng Qian,Jiayu Liu,Heng Ji*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出UserHarness框架，通过显式重构用户心智状态（信念、意图、观察），在Theory-of-Mind任务中达到95.94%的准确率，比现有方法提升15-20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ToM方法使用复杂流水线间接建模行为，未能显式重构用户心智状态，忽略了用户基于信念和意图行动的核心结构。

Method: UserHarness框架将ToM推理重构为显式的用户心智重建，分解用户的心智状态（观察、信念、意图）及其与外部环境的关系，并追踪后续行动。

Result: 在五个基准测试中达到95.94%的宏平均准确率，比现有推理方法相对提升超过15%，比最强纯提示方法相对提升约20%。

Conclusion: 鲁棒的用户理解需要从用户心智根源出发进行推理，用户心智重建可作为更自适应智能助手的有效基础。

Abstract: Understanding what a user believes and intends is central to building effective agent assistants. This ability is often evaluated through Theory-of-Mind (ToM) tasks, where success requires reasoning from the user's perspective. However, many existing approaches address ToM with complex pipelines that model behavior indirectly, without explicitly reconstructing the user's mental state. This misses the core structure of the problem: users act based on their beliefs, which are updated through observations of the environment; beliefs and intentions jointly determine actions, which in turn change the environment; and social reasoning often requires nested beliefs about what others believe or intend. We propose UserHarness, a simple framework that reframes ToM reasoning as explicit user-mind reconstruction. UserHarness decomposes the user's mental state, its relation to the external environment, and the actions that follow from it, enabling agents to track what the user observes, believes, intends, and does. Across five benchmarks, UserHarness reaches up to 95.94% macro accuracy, improving over existing inference methods by more than 15% relative and over the strongest prompt-only harness by about 20% relative. These results suggest that robust user understanding requires reasoning from the roots of the user's mind, positioning user harnessing as a promising foundation for more adaptive future assistants.

</details>


### [140] [UNIQUE: Universal Top-k Sparse Attention for Training-free Inference and Sparsity-aware Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27740)
*Keqi Deng,Shaoshi Ling,Ruchao Fan,Jinyu Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出UNIQUE通用top-k稀疏注意力框架，通过KV页重要性评分和软掩码训练方案，在长上下文文本和语音LLM中实现高效推理，最高获得11.4倍注意力加速和5.3倍端到端解码加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文推理中，自注意力KV缓存线性增长成为瓶颈。现有top-k稀疏注意力虽能减少缓存加载，但准确且廉价地估计缓存重要性（既适用于免训练使用，也适用于稀疏感知训练）仍然具有挑战性。

Method: 提出UNIQUE框架：1) 以KV页为粒度，用页内键均值和标准差组合作为重要性评分；2) 引入软掩码稀疏感知训练方案，以top-k分数边界作为逐查询阈值，配合sigmoid软掩码，无需辅助损失或架构修改。

Result: 在文本和语音LLM上，UNIQUE在LongBench Pro等长上下文基准测试中保持任务性能，同时相较于FlashInfer密集注意力实现高达11.4倍注意力核加速，相较于vLLM密集模型实现至少5.3倍端到端解码加速。

Conclusion: UNIQUE是一种通用的top-k稀疏注意力框架，能够同时满足免训练使用和稀疏感知训练的需求，在多种LLM模态下保持有效性，显著提升长上下文推理效率。

Abstract: Long-context inference in large language models (LLMs) is bottlenecked by the linear growth of the self-attention key-value (KV) cache. Top-k sparse attention alleviates this by loading only a small fraction of the KV cache, but accurately and cheaply estimating cache importance, for both training-free use and sparsity-aware training, remains challenging. This paper proposes UNIQUE, a universal top-k sparse attention framework that addresses both requirements and stays consistently effective across LLM modalities. UNIQUE operates at the granularity of KV pages and estimates per-page importance with a simple yet accurate score combining the mean of the page's keys as a representative vector with their standard deviation as an offset term. To further close the train-inference gap, this paper introduces a soft-mask sparsity-aware training scheme that uses the top-k score boundary as a per-query threshold and a sigmoid soft mask around it, requiring neither auxiliary losses nor architectural changes. Experiments on text and speech LLMs show that UNIQUE preserves task performance on long-context benchmarks such as LongBench Pro and on long-form speech recognition, while delivering up to 11.4x attention-kernel speedup over FlashInfer dense attention and at least 5.3x end-to-end decoding speedup over a vLLM-based dense model.

</details>


### [141] [Escape the Language Prior: Mitigating Late-Stage Modality Collapse in Audio Reasoning via Modality-Aware Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27741)
*Cihan Xiao,Yiwen Shao,Chenxing Li,Xiang He,Zhenwen Liang,Steve Yves,Sanjeev Khudanpur,Liefeng Bo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MAPO，通过模态感知策略梯度与注意力损失，缓解多模态大语言模型在强化学习后训练中的模态崩塌问题，在音频推理任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准强化学习后训练算法（如GRPO）对所有token施加统一策略梯度，忽略了非文本源模态的关键性，导致多模态模型在长链推理中逐渐抛弃源信号，产生有信心的幻觉。

Method: MAPO包含两个分支：(1) 模态感知策略梯度：通过音频消融参考与多模态策略的交叉模态微分熵导出模态相关性掩码，动态聚焦梯度于模态关键token；(2) 辅助注意力损失：对模型内部注意力分布施加目标性、时间尺度化的惩罚，迫使模型在推理轨迹深处维持跨模态关联。

Result: 在复杂音频推理基准上，MAPO显著提升了长时推理保真度和多模态指令跟随能力，在多个关键基准上达到开源模型SOTA。

Conclusion: MAPO仅依赖原生统计信号而非领域偏见，为缓解多模态系统中的认知崩塌提供了通用性基础方案。

Abstract: Audio and omni-modal large language models exhibit impressive cross-modal reasoning capabilities. However, applying standard reinforcement learning post-training algorithms to these models exposes a critical structural vulnerability: methods like GRPO apply uniform policy gradients across all tokens, ignoring their unequal dependence on the non-text source modality. This exacerbates late-stage modality collapse during extended chain-of-thought generation, where models progressively abandon the primary source signal in favor of compressed textual priors, leading to confident but ungrounded hallucinations. To address this, we introduce Modality-Aware Policy Optimization (MAPO), a novel dual-branch reinforcement learning framework. First, MAPO dynamically concentrates the policy gradient on modality-critical tokens using a modality relevance mask, which is derived from the cross-modal differential entropy between an audio-ablated reference and the multimodal policy. Second, it integrates an auxiliary attention loss branch that applies a targeted, temporally scaled penalty to the model's internal attention distributions. This ensures the model actively sustains cross-modal grounding deep into the reasoning trace. Evaluations on complex audio reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that MAPO substantially improves long-horizon reasoning fidelity and multimodal instruction following, achieving highly competitive performance and setting new state-of-the-art results on several key benchmarks among open-weight models. By relying strictly on native statistical signals rather than domain-specific inductive biases, MAPO offers a promising foundation for mitigating epistemic collapse across diverse multimodal systems.

</details>


### [142] [Reading or Guessing? Visual Grounding Failures of Vision-Language Models for OCR in Ancient Greek Editions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27750)
*Antonia Karamolegkou,Nicolas Angleraud,Benoît Sagot,Thibault Clérice*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究VLM在低资源古希腊文献OCR中会生成流畅但视觉上无依据的文本，依赖语言先验；传统OCR虽产生噪声但更忠实于图像。不同模型的视觉依赖程度不同，解码时干预难以恢复视觉依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在OCR中可能生成视觉上无依据但流畅的文本（幻觉），已有证据表明其依赖语言先验。本文欲在低资源历史文献（古希腊文）这一更具挑战的场景中，系统探究VLM与传统OCR在视觉忠实性上的差异。

Method: 1）对比多种开源VLM与传统OCR基线在古希腊文献上的表现；2）引入可控图像扰动（字符级）；3）提出基于条件解码与无图像解码分布的token级视觉依据度量；4）测试解码时干预及后OCR语言模型校正的效果。

Result: VLM出错时仍产生流畅的希腊文替换，传统OCR则表现为局部噪声。字符级扰动下，VLM偏离扰动后的真实文本，传统OCR更忠实。Token级分析表明，OCR专用模型的流畅错误几乎不依赖图像，通用VLM即使出错仍保持视觉条件依赖。解码时干预无法可靠恢复视觉依据，后OCR校正能提升部分系统效果。

Conclusion: VLM在低资源历史文献OCR中同样存在语言先验依赖问题，流畅输出不等于视觉依据充分。研究呼吁超越聚合准确率，采用可解释性驱动的评估方法。

Abstract: Recent work has shown that Vision-Language Models (VLMs) used for optical character recognition (OCR) can generate plausible but visually unsupported text, suggesting reliance on language priors. Comparing open-weight VLMs with traditional OCR baselines on low-resource Ancient Greek critical editions, we show that VLM errors often remain fluent even when wrong, producing plausible Greek substitutions where traditional engines produce local recognition noise. To analyze visual evidence during decoding, we introduce controlled image perturbations and token-level grounding measures based on conditional versus image-free decoding distributions. Under character-level perturbations, VLMs diverge sharply from the perturbed ground truth while traditional OCR remains comparatively faithful; however, token-level analysis shows that prior reliance is model-specific: in an OCR-specialist model, fluent lexical errors are produced with little reliance on the image, whereas general-purpose VLMs remain conditioned on the visual input even when wrong. Decode-time interventions fail to reliably restore grounding, while post-OCR language-model correction improves several systems only by repairing text after generation. Our results extend prior evidence of OCR language-prior reliance to low-resource historical documents and a broader set of models, showing that fluent output is not necessarily visually grounded and motivating interpretability-driven evaluation beyond aggregate accuracy.

</details>


### [143] [UniMaia: Steering Chess Policies with Language for Human-like Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27767)
*Sherman Siu,Lesley Istead*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出UniMaia框架，通过参数高效文本编码器和ControlNet式条件机制，在不进行端到端多模态训练的情况下，实现对冻结的Lc0国际象棋策略网络的语义可控调节（如开局选择、棋力控制），并引入UniMaia-Aux增强时序条件与行为预测。在多个基准上取得SOTA预期准确率，展示了提示条件控制与领域策略网络结合的可能性与权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型虽能实现自然语言控制复杂系统，但往往需要大规模多模态训练或削弱领域特定的归纳偏置。在国际象棋等结构化决策领域，专用策略网络性能强但缺乏语义可控性，而提示条件语言模型虽灵活但领域基础较弱。因此，作者希望在不进行端到端多模态训练的前提下，实现对专用策略网络的语义级控制。

Method: 提出UniMaia框架：(1) 冻结Lc0国际象棋策略网络作为基座；(2) 使用参数高效文本编码器处理自然语言提示；(3) 借鉴ControlNet机制将文本条件注入到策略网络中。另提出UniMaia-Aux，额外加入时序条件与行为预测目标。同时构建大规模元数据增强的Lichess数据集，开发半自动提示生成管线，并设计提示条件和元数据条件两个评估基准。

Result: UniMaia在多个提示条件基准上取得SOTA预期准确率，在通用指令跟随任务上达到有竞争力的top-move准确率，在人类走棋预测任务上与专用元数据条件方法相当。UniMaia-Aux进一步提升预期准确率和行为建模能力，但在top-move准确率上有轻微牺牲。

Conclusion: 提示条件控制专用领域策略网络是可行的，无需端到端多模态训练；但可控性与预测性能之间存在权衡。UniMaia框架为将自然语言语义控制引入结构化决策领域提供了一种高效范式。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models have enabled natural language to serve as a flexible interface for controlling complex systems, but often at the cost of large-scale multimodal training or weakened domain-specific inductive biases. In structured decision-making domains such as chess, specialized policy networks achieve strong performance but lack semantic controllability, while prompt-conditioned language models are more flexible yet typically exhibit weaker domain grounding. We propose $\textbf{UniMaia}$, a framework for prompt-conditioned policy modulation that adapts a frozen Lc0-based chess policy network using a parameter-efficient text encoder and a ControlNet-style conditioning mechanism. UniMaia enables semantic control over gameplay, including opening selection and player strength, while preserving the pretrained policy representations. We further introduce $\textbf{UniMaia-Aux}$, which incorporates auxiliary temporal conditioning and behavioral prediction objectives. To support this work, we construct a large-scale metadata-augmented Lichess dataset, develop a semi-automated prompt-generation pipeline, and introduce benchmarks spanning both prompt-conditioned and metadata-conditioned settings. UniMaia achieves state-of-the-art expected accuracy on several prompt-conditioned benchmarks and competitive top-move accuracy on general instruction-following tasks, while remaining competitive with dedicated metadata-conditioned approaches on human move prediction benchmarks. UniMaia-Aux further improves expected accuracy and behavioral modeling across several evaluation settings, with modest trade-offs in top-move accuracy. Overall, our results demonstrate that prompt-conditioned control of domain-specific policy networks is feasible without end-to-end multimodal training, while highlighting trade-offs between controllability and predictive performance.

</details>


### [144] [Do Models Know Why They Changed Their Mind? Interpretability and Faithfulness of Chain-of-Thought Under Knowledge Conflict](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27773)
*Pruthvinath Jeripity Venkata*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文研究了语言模型在遇到与训练知识矛盾的文档时的决策机制，发现链式思维推理高度稳定（96%相似度），但自评置信度包含微弱但真实的信号。内部推理令牌比外部CoT更敏感，建议监控置信度而非推理过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型面对矛盾信息时的决策机制，特别是链式思维推理是否忠实反映了模型内部的决策过程。

Method: 通过200个问题、8个模型和4种提示条件，测试模型的"内省忠实性"，分析CoT推理与决策之间的耦合关系。

Result: 1) CoT推理高度稳定，翻转对保留96%的相同答案相似度；2) 置信度包含微弱信号，对冷门事实能预测决策（p<0.001）；3) GPT-4o是唯一具有可靠推理-决策耦合的模型；4) 内部推理令牌比用户可见CoT更敏感于决策。

Conclusion: CoT可分解为决策不变的知識展示（~96%）和薄的置信度层（弱但真实）。监控置信度比分析推理过程更有效。

Abstract: When a language model sees a document contradicting its training knowledge, it must choose: follow the document or trust itself. Prior work proved this choice depends on how well-known the fact is. We ask: does the model's chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning faithfully report this mechanism? We introduce introspective faithfulness and test it across 200 questions, 8 models, and 4 prompt conditions. We find CoT reasoning is highly stable across opposite decisions: flip pairs retain 96% of same-answer similarity (d=0.34; confirmed by ROUGE-L, d=0.45). Yet self-rated confidence carries a faint genuine signal: for obscure facts where entity fame is uninformative, confidence still predicts decisions (p<0.001) and tracks item-level knowledge (r=0.134). GPT-4o is the only model with statistically reliable reasoning-decision coupling. Claude Sonnet 4.6 shows the widest confidence range (SD=1.39) but near-zero pooled correlation because the confidence-decision relationship reverses between conditions; a temperature ablation confirms this is model-specific. Internal thinking tokens show greater decision-sensitivity than user-facing CoT (p=0.033). CoT decomposes into a decision-invariant knowledge display (~96%) and a thin confidence layer with weak but real signal. For monitoring: read confidence, not the argument.

</details>


### [145] [ChildEval: When large language models meet children's personalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27805)
*Yanyan Luo,Xue Han,Chunxu Zhao,Ruiqiao Bai,Yaxing Zhang,Qian Hu,Lijun Mei,Junlan Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ChildEval是一个评估LLM在长对话中推断和遵循儿童偏好的基准，包含29K个3-6岁儿童画像和显/隐性偏好表达，实验表明不同个性化表征影响LLM响应，微调可提升儿童中心表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM个性化聊天机器人缺乏对儿童中心个性化的系统评估，儿童特定的偏好评估尚属空白。

Method: 构建了ChildEval基准，包含29K个3-6岁儿童合成画像（静态背景信息），每个画像关联一个儿童偏好（与画像一致、冲突或独立），通过单句显式或6-10轮对话隐式表达。覆盖5个顶层和14个子层类别，设计了细粒度儿童中心评估协议。

Result: 实验揭示了不同个性化表征方式对LLM响应的影响，微调ChildEval可提升儿童中心性能。

Conclusion: ChildEval填补了儿童中心LLM个性化评估的空白，为开发更适配儿童需求的对话系统提供了基准和训练数据。

Abstract: While LLMs enable personalized chatbots, their effectiveness in child-centered personalization remains unclear, as systematic evaluation of child-specific preferences is still lacking. To address this gap, we introduce ChildEval, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs' ability to infer and follow child-centered preferences in long-context conversations. ChildEval contains 29K synthesized persona profiles of children aged 3-6, providing relatively static background information. Each persona is associated with a child preference-which may align with, conflict with, or be independent of the persona-expressed either explicitly in a single sentence or implicitly through 6-10 turn dialogues. Explicit and implicit preferences are designed to reflect the same underlying preference but differ in expression, capturing dynamic aspects of preference expression rather than changes in the static persona. The benchmark spans five top-level and fourteen sub-level categories covering children's daily lives and development. We further propose fine-grained, child-centric evaluation protocols to systematically assess open-source LLMs. Experimental results demonstrate how different personalized representations affect LLM responses and suggest that finetuning on ChildEval can enhance child-centered performance. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/ziyanluo/ChildEval.

</details>


### [146] [TARQ: Tail-Aware Reconstruction Quantization for Rare-Word Robust Automatic Speech Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27808)
*Xinyu Wang,Ziyu Zhao,Ke Bai,Silin Meng,Dongming Shen,Xiao-Wen Chang,Yixuan HE*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出TARQ，一种面向ASR词级后训练量化的标签无关框架，通过rareBAL规则重新平衡校准数据中常见词与稀有词的比例，在不需额外标注或训练的情况下显著降低稀有词错误率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据感知PTQ方法在ASR任务中按经验频率隐式加权，导致稀有词（如人名、数字、领域术语）在校准过程中权重不足，与ASR对尾部敏感的风险目标不一致。

Method: 提出TARQ框架，包含rareBAL——一种闭式的逐线性层规则，用于平衡常见词与稀有词的校准质量分布；以及基于度量的残差校正步骤，无需实体标签、精选校准集、验证解码或额外训练。

Result: 在8个ASR骨干网络和6个数据集上，W4G128量化设置下，TARQ在降低稀有词错误率的同时未导致整体WER退化，跨语料库的rare-WER波动最小，并在实体丰富基准（ProfASR, ContextASR-Speech-En）上无需实体监督即取得最优性能。

Conclusion: TARQ有效解决了ASR中PTQ校准与尾部风险之间的错配问题，是一种轻量、无标签依赖的实用量化方案，尤其适用于对稀有词汇敏感的语音识别场景。

Abstract: Data-aware post-training quantization (PTQ) minimizes a per-token reconstruction loss on a small calibration corpus, implicitly weighting positions by their empirical frequency. For \textbf{A}utomatic \textbf{S}peech \textbf{R}ecognition (ASR), this misaligns with tail-sensitive risk: names, numerals, and domain-specific words receive proportionally little calibration mass. We propose \textbf{Tail-Aware Reconstruction Quantization} (\TARQ), a label-free PTQ framework that shifts calibration toward the lexical tail via \textbf{\rareBAL}, a closed-form per-Linear-layer rule equalizing common/tail mass, paired with a metric-consistent residual correction. \TARQ\ requires no entity labels, no curated calibration set, no validation decoding, and no additional training.
