*Qiyuan Wang,Yao Li,Raymond K. W. Wong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于密度比估计的双层优化后门攻击方法，通过将触发样本置于干净数据的低密度区域，同时实现高攻击成功率和对微调、剪枝等防御的强免疫力，揭示当前防御范式在分布外检测方面的根本缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后门攻击易被微调或剪枝等防御手段消除，需要设计更鲁棒的攻击方法以暴露防御范式的漏洞。

Method: 提出双层优化框架，利用条件时间分数匹配估计密度比，通过混合模型目标将触发样本引导至干净数据分布的低密度区域，实现在贝叶斯最优训练模型下的最优样本特定触发器构造。

Result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、GTSRB和TinyImageNet上实现99%以上的攻击成功率，在微调防御下后防御ASR比最强基线高50-85个百分点，对神经元剪枝防御完全免疫（零神经元被识别）。

Conclusion: 当前防御范式存在根本性缺陷，未来需要设计超越干净数据分布支撑集的防御方法。

Abstract: Despite recent progress in backdoor attacks, existing methods remain susceptible to post-training defenses that erase the backdoor through fine-tuning or pruning. We revisit the core objectives of backdoor attacks and derive principled criteria characterizing optimal sample-specific trigger construction under a Bayes-optimal model of the victim's training. Our analysis reveals that both attack success and clean-accuracy preservation are simultaneously optimized when triggered samples are steered into low-density regions of the clean data distribution, a distributional condition that controls all moments of the poisoned distribution at once rather than a handful of input-space summary statistics. We introduce a bilevel optimization framework that estimates density ratios via conditional time-score matching and optimizes a mixture-model objective to place triggered samples in these sparse regions. Extensive evaluations on MNIST, CIFAR-10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet demonstrate that our method achieves above 99\% attack success rate before defense and retains 50--85 percentage points higher post-defense ASR than the strongest baselines under fine-tuning defenses. Against neuron-pruning defenses, the method exhibits complete immunity, with zero neurons identified for removal across all pruning thresholds. These results expose a fundamental gap in current defense paradigms and underscore the need for defenses that operate beyond the support of the clean distribution.

</details>


### [298] [ReSAE: Residualized Sparse Autoencoders for Multi-Layer Transformer Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27819)
*Prathyush Poduval,Calvin Yeung,Neel Desai,Mohsen Imani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Residualized Sparse Autoencoders (ReSAEs)，通过在层间拟合仿射变换并仅对残差进行稀疏编码，减少了多层SAE之间的冗余表示，在保持下游计算相关性的同时改善了多层替换下的模型困惑度恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统稀疏自编码器按层独立训练，但Transformer残差流在不同深度间存在强耦合，导致多层干预时不同层的字典会冗余编码相同信息，且多层替换产生的交互效应无法由单层行为预测。

Method: ReSAEs在选定层之间拟合仿射变换，使后层SAE仅对未解释的残差进行训练，并通过仿射链将重建结果映射回原始激活空间。这样既能保持与普通SAE相同的干预协议，又减少了跨层冗余。

Result: 在Pythia-1.4B和Gemma-2-9B上，残差化减少了解码器冗余，在多数设置下改善了稀疏探针和定向扰动效果。尽管重建的原始激活方差更少，但在多层替换下ReSAEs恢复了更多Transformer交叉熵损失。

Conclusion: 消除线性可预测的跨层结构是多层SAE干预的有用默认策略，ReSAEs保留了与模型下游计算最相关的激活成分。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders are usually trained one layer at a time, even though transformer residual stream activations are strongly coupled across depth. This creates a practical problem for multi-layer interventions: different layerwise dictionaries can spend capacity representing the same carried-forward information, and replacing several layers at once can produce interactions that are not predicted by single-layer behavior. We introduce Residualized Sparse Autoencoders (ReSAEs), which fit an affine map between selected layers and train each later-layer SAE on the unexplained residual rather than on the full activation. Reconstructions are mapped back into the original activation space through the fitted affine chain, so ReSAEs can be evaluated with the same intervention protocols as ordinary SAEs. On Pythia-1.4B and Gemma-2-9B, residualization reduces decoder redundancy and improves sparse probing and targeted perturbation in most tested settings. Despite reconstructing less of the raw activation variance, ReSAEs recover more transformer cross entropy under multi-layer replacement. This gain is clearest under teacher-forcing and at sufficient sparsity online, indicating that ReSAEs preserve the components of the activation most relevant to the model's downstream computation. These results suggest that removing linearly predictable cross-layer structure is a useful default for multi-layer SAE interventions.

</details>


### [299] [Decentralized Parameter-Free Online Learning with Compressed Gossip](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27831)
*Tomas Ortega,Hamid Jafarkhani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DECO-EF，一种去中心化参数自由的在线学习算法，结合coin-betting预测与压缩差分gossip通信，首次在压缩通信下实现了预期次线性网络遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统去中心化在线方法需要依赖于时域、比较器尺度等问题的学习率选择，且压缩通信会引入额外的disagreement需要控制。现有方法缺乏参数自由且能处理压缩通信的方案。

Method: 提出DECO-EF算法，结合coin-betting预测与压缩差分gossip通信。每个智能体维护一个干净的累积状态和一个压缩跟踪器，在gossip步骤中仅通信压缩后的状态差分。

Result: 证明了DECO-EF在压缩通信下具有预期比较器自适应的网络遗憾界，这是首个在压缩通信下实现预期次线性网络遗憾保证的参数自由去中心化在线学习算法。

Conclusion: 该方法在参数自由（无需调优时域、比较器范数或学习率）的同时，能在压缩通信下达到次线性遗憾，填补了该领域的空白。

Abstract: We study decentralized online convex optimization when agents communicate over a graph and messages may be compressed. Classical decentralized online methods typically require learning-rate choices that depend on the horizon, comparator scale, or other problem parameters, while compressed communication introduces additional disagreement that must be controlled. We propose DECO-EF (DEcentralized COin-betting with Error Feedback), a decentralized parameter-free online learning algorithm that combines coin-betting predictions with compressed difference-based gossip. Each agent maintains a clean accumulated state and a compressed tracker, and communicates only compressed state differences during gossip steps. The method is parameter-free in the online-learning sense: it does not tune to the horizon, the comparator norm, or the learning rate. We prove expected comparator-adaptive network-regret bounds for DECO-EF under compressed communication. To the best of our knowledge, this gives the first expected sublinear network-regret guarantees for parameter-free decentralized online learning under compressed communication.

</details>


### [300] [Reward Transfer from Inverse Reinforcement Learning: A Coupled Minimax Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27834)
*Guang-Yuan Hao,Lars van der Laan,Aurélien Bibaut,Nathan Kallus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究如何将在源环境中通过逆强化学习从专家演示中学到的奖励迁移到新目标环境的强化学习中，提出了联合求解跨环境Bellman方程组的耦合方法，该方法相比顺序方法能消除源Bellman残差的一阶影响，并在理论上和实验上证明了其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 演示数据通常是在受控环境（源环境）中收集的，但实际应用时需要在不同环境（目标环境）中进行强化学习。如何有效地跨环境迁移从专家演示中学到的奖励函数是一个关键问题。

Method: 将问题建模为跨源环境和目标环境的联合Bellman方程组系统，提出耦合求解方法（联合求解）与顺序求解方法（先估计源奖励再代入目标控制问题）进行对比。开发了目标软Q函数的极小极大估计器，并进行了理论分析。

Result: 证明耦合方法相比顺序方法能消除源Bellman残差的一阶影响；给出了两种方法的局部行为刻画、有限样本软Q函数误差界以及软控制策略的遗憾保证；在脓毒症模拟器上的实验验证了理论比较结果。

Conclusion: 耦合方法在跨环境奖励迁移中优于顺序方法，能更有效地处理源环境中的估计误差，具有更好的理论性质和实际表现。

Abstract: We study the transfer of rewards learned using inverse reinforcement learning from expert demonstrations in one environment to reinforcement learning in a new, different environment. This arises naturally when demonstrations are collected in a controlled environment. We formulate the problem as a joint system of Bellman equations across the source and target environments and develop minimax estimators for the target soft-$q$-function. Whereas a sequential solution approach first estimates the source reward and then plugs it into the target control problem, a coupled approach solves the source and target system of equations jointly. We show that, in contrast to the sequential approach, the coupled approach removes the first-order influence of source Bellman residual error. We characterize the local behavior of each approach, develop finite-sample soft-$q$-function error bounds, and prove regret guarantees for the resulting soft-control policy. An empirical investigation using a sepsis simulator validates the theoretical comparison.

</details>


### [301] [CAREF: Calibration-Aware Regularization for Explanation Faithfulness Without Rationale Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27835)
*Naphat Nithisopa,Teerapong Panboonyuen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CAREF是一个参数高效微调框架，通过校准感知正则化同时优化预测准确性和解释忠实度，使用单一统一损失函数LSCED结合熵校准与token级稀疏控制，无需理由监督。在4个NLE基准上使用Flan-T5评估，其轻量变体CAREF-AQ仅用6.43%可训练参数达到最佳平均准确率89.04和解释对齐度81.00 nBERT，优于LoRA和AdaLoRA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法在提升预测准确性的同时，往往忽视了模型解释的忠实度，且缺乏将熵校准与稀疏正则化统一于单一训练目标的框架。

Method: 提出CAREF框架，核心是设计了一个统一的损失函数LSCED，将基于熵的校准与token级稀疏控制耦合在一起，通过校准感知正则化同时优化预测准确性和解释忠实度，无需人工标注的理由监督信号。

Result: 在COS-E、ECQA、ComVE和e-SNLI四个NLE基准上，CAREF-AQ变体（仅使用6.43%可训练参数）达到平均准确率89.04%和nBERT解释对齐度81.00，优于LoRA和AdaLoRA等基线方法。

Conclusion: CAREF是首个将熵正则化与稀疏正则化统一于单一训练目标用于可解释LLM微调的方法，在极低参数开销下实现了预测准确性与解释忠实度的双赢。

Abstract: We introduce CAREF, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework that jointly optimizes predictive accuracy and explanation faithfulness via calibration-aware regularization. At its core, CAREF couples entropy-based calibration with token-level sparsity control through a single unified loss, the Calibration-Aware Regularization for Explanation Faithfulness (LSCED), without requiring rationale supervision. Evaluated on four NLE benchmarks (COS-E, ECQA, ComVE, e-SNLI) with Flan-T5, our lightweight CAREF-AQ variant attains the best average accuracy (89.04) and explanation alignment (81.00 nBERT) using only 6.43% of trainable parameters, outperforming LoRA and AdaLoRA. To our knowledge, CAREF is the first method to unify entropy and sparsity regularization in a single training objective for interpretable LLM fine-tuning.

</details>


### [302] [From Detection to Mechanism: Cross-Attention Graph Neural Networks Enable Drug-Drug Interaction Type Prediction An Ablation Study with Acetylsalicylic Acid Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27861)
*Juergen Dietrich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究系统消融实验表明，双MPNN+交叉注意力（CrossAtt）相比拼接（Concat）使多分类F1-macro提升45%（+0.186），但二分类AUC仅提升1.3%（+0.012），证实原子级跨分子通信对机制类型分类至关重要；三元架构因训练不稳定而表现不佳；CrossAtt在10个阿司匹林药物对中实现10/10正确预测，而三元架构为0/10。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 药物相互作用预测中，二元检测（是否相互作用）与多类机制分类存在本质差异，现有方法未充分区分这两种任务，需要系统研究不同架构在两类任务上的表现差异。

Method: 对三种GNN架构（Siamese双MPNN+拼接、双MPNN+四头交叉注意力、三元MPNN+交互图）进行系统消融实验，在包含38,337个正样本对（86种交互类型）的公开基准数据集上，使用相同训练条件（n=61,339对）进行对比，并在10个阿司匹林药物对上进行验证。

Result: CrossAtt在多分类F1-macro上比Concat高0.186（+45%），但二元AUC仅高0.012（+1.3%）；三元架构性能较差，10个ASA药物对预测为0/10正确；所有架构存在两个一致的失败案例。

Conclusion: 原子级跨分子通信（交叉注意力）是实现DDI机制类型分类的关键，而非二元检测；三元架构失败源于训练不稳定性；存在结构限制导致的系统性失败案例。

Abstract: Predicting whether two drugs interact (binary detection) is a substantially dif- ferent task from predicting the mechanism type of that interaction (multi-class classification). This study presents a systematic ablation study of three Graph Neural Network (GNN) architectures for drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction on a publicly available benchmark dataset comprising 38,337 positive pairs across 86 interaction types. Three architectures are compared under identical training conditions (n = 61,339 pairs): a siamese dual Message Passing Neural Network (MPNN) with concatenation (Concat), a dual MPNN with four-head cross-attention (CrossAtt), and a ternary MPNN incorporating an interaction graph (Ternary). CrossAtt improves multi-class F1-macro by +0.186 absolute (+45%) over Concat, while improving binary AUC by only +0.012 (+1.3%) - confirming that atom-level inter-molecular communication specifically enables mechanism-type classification. The ternary architecture underperforms despite equivalent training data, with its failure consistent with a training instability hypothesis. Validation on ten acetylsali- cylic acid (ASA) drug pairs, held out prior to training, demonstrates 10/10 correct DDI-type predictions for CrossAtt versus 0/10 for Ternary. Two consistent failure cases are identified across all architectures, linking to structural limits established in a companion toxicity study.

</details>


### [303] [SPAR: Support-Preserving Action Rectification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27877)
*Jiaxin Zhao,Weihang Pan,Xun Liang,Binbin Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SPAR框架，通过将全局学习重构为局部残差修正，并结合潜在自模仿机制，解决了离线策略改进中价值最大化与数据分布拟合之间的冲突，在D4RL基准上取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线策略改进面临两个核心矛盾：一是价值最大化与数据分布拟合之间的固有冲突；二是在样本加权回归中过度保守会抑制分布尾部的高价值动作，而梯度方法又存在拟合-优化冲突导致策略偏离数据流形。

Method: 提出支持保留动作修正（SPAR）框架：将全局学习重构为基于冻结行为克隆策略的局部残差修正，在残差空间中进行细粒度拟合和局部策略改进，从而收缩搜索空间。进一步引入潜在自模仿机制，利用潜在采样加权回归来解决残差空间中的拟合-改进梯度冲突。

Result: 理论上证明该机制消除了标准价值梯度的流形法向漂移；在D4RL基准实验上，SPAR能从次优基线中提取显著增益，达到SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 通过残差空间中的局部策略改进和潜在自模仿机制，有效平衡了拟合与优化，为离线策略改进提供了一种新的高效范式。

Abstract: Offline policy improvement faces an inherent conflict between maximizing value and fitting the data distribution. While in-sample weighted regression is stable, it suffers from over-conservatism that suppresses high-value actions in the distribution tail; conversely, gradient-based approaches often exhibit a fitting-optimization conflict of gradients, which drives the policy off the data manifold. To address this, we propose Support-Preserving Action Rectification (SPAR), which reframes global learning as a local residual rectification anchored to a frozen pure behavior cloning policy. This framework performs fine-grained fitting and local policy improvement in the residual space, thereby contracting the search space. We further introduce Latent Self-Imitation, utilizing a latent-sampling weighted-regression mechanism to address fitting-improvement gradient conflict in the residual space. Theoretically, we prove this mechanism eliminates the manifold-normal drift of standard value gradients, while extensive D4RL experiments show SPAR extracts significant gains from suboptimal baselines to achieve state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [304] [FedEHR-Gen: Federated Synthetic Time-Series EHR Generation via Latent Space Alignment and Distribution-Aware Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27892)
*Jun Bai,Ziyang Song,Yue Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FedEHR-Gen，首个用于分布式医院间合成时序电子健康记录生成的联邦学习框架，通过两阶段学习（联邦自编码器+时序条件变分自编码器）解决高维稀疏和跨医院异质性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EHR生成模型多为集中式，需要汇聚多医院数据，而真实场景中数据共享受限；联邦EHR生成面临高维稀疏性和跨医院异质性导致的模型崩溃或发散问题。

Method: 两阶段联邦学习范式：1）联邦自编码器将高维稀疏EHR特征投影到紧凑潜空间，采用逐层匹配聚合机制确保语义一致性；2）在统一潜空间上训练联邦时序条件变分自编码器（TCVAE），使用分布感知聚合处理跨医院异质性。

Result: 在eICU和MIMIC-III数据集上，FedEHR-Gen在生成保真度、下游效用和隐私风险方面与集中式训练相当，且持续优于标准联邦基线方法。

Conclusion: FedEHR-Gen是首个有效解决分布式医院间时序EHR生成问题的联邦框架，为隐私约束下的医疗数据增强和跨医院建模提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Synthetic Electronic Health Record (EHR) generation provides a promising avenue for data augmentation and cross-hospital modeling in privacy-constrained healthcare settings. However, most existing EHR generative models are centralized and require pooling data across hospitals, which is often infeasible when real-world data sharing is restricted. While federated EHR generation offers a natural solution, direct federated modeling often collapses or diverges due to the high dimensionality, sparsity, and cross-hospital heterogeneity of EHR data. In this work, we propose FedEHR-Gen, the first federated framework for synthetic time-series EHR generation across distributed hospitals. FedEHR-Gen uses a two-stage learning paradigm. First, we introduce a federated autoencoder that projects high-dimensional and sparse EHR features onto a compact latent space. To ensure semantic consistency across hospitals, we develop a layer-wise matching aggregation mechanism that aligns local encoders into a unified global latent space. Second, operating on this aligned latent space, we train a federated temporal conditional variational autoencoder (TCVAE) with distribution-aware aggregation, enabling stable temporal generative modeling under severe cross-hospital heterogeneity. Extensive experiments on the eICU and MIMIC-III datasets demonstrate that FedEHR-Gen achieves generation fidelity, downstream utility, and privacy risk comparable to centralized training, while consistently outperforming the standard federated baseline.

</details>


### [305] [Where LLM Annotators Fail: Label-Free Learning on Graphs with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27913)
*Safal Thapaliya,Jiatan Huang,Chuxu Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CANE是一个无标签学习框架，通过估计聚类条件下的LLM可靠性来处理节点分类中的噪声伪标签，在多个图基准测试中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图上的节点分类需要大量标注数据，而人工标注成本高昂。LLM可以提供低成本的自动标注，但其生成的标签存在噪声。现有方法将LLM噪声视为全局或类别相关的，但研究发现LLM标注错误不仅是类别相关的，还具有区域依赖性——同一类别内不同特征空间簇的可靠性差异很大。

Method: 提出Cluster-Aware Noise Estimation (CANE)框架，在无真实标签的情况下估计聚类条件下的LLM可靠性，并据此决定哪些伪标签可信、哪些需要修正。

Result: 在多个图基准和GNN骨干网络上，CANE优于最强的无标签基线方法，在聚类条件噪声更强的数据集上改进最大。

Conclusion: LLM标注噪声具有聚类依赖性，考虑这种聚类条件噪声的无标签学习框架能有效提升节点分类性能。

Abstract: Node classification on graphs often requires labeled nodes, yet obtaining labels at graph scale is expensive. When node attributes contain semantic content, such as paper abstracts, web pages, or product descriptions, large language models (LLMs) can provide low-cost supervision by annotating a small subset of nodes. However, these LLM-generated labels are noisy, and existing label-free graph learning methods usually treat this noise as either global or class-conditional. We find that LLM annotation errors are not only class-dependent but also region-dependent: within the same class, reliability can vary sharply across feature-space clusters. In light of this, we propose Cluster-Aware Noise Estimation (CANE), a label-free learning framework that estimates cluster-conditional LLM reliability without ground truth labels, and uses this estimate to decide which pseudo-labels to trust, and which labels to correct. Across various graph benchmarks and GNN backbones, CANE improves over the strongest label-free baselines, with the largest gains on datasets exhibiting stronger cluster-conditional noise.

</details>


### [306] [Cyclical Entropy Eruption: Entropy Dynamics in Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27954)
*Wendi Li,Shawn Im,Sharon Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现智能体强化学习训练中存在一种称为"循环熵爆发"的新现象，即熵值周期性急剧上升后缓慢下降，并可能导致退化模式累积。为此提出SEAL方法，通过分离正确与错误轨迹的表示空间来稳定训练，实验证明其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体强化学习的训练动态尚不明确，限制了我们对训练不稳定的诊断和更有效训练算法的设计能力。

Method: 通过理论分析和实证研究，识别出智能体RL中"循环熵爆发"现象的三阶段动态机制，并提出SEAL（分离增强型智能体学习）辅助损失函数，在表示空间中分离正确和错误轨迹。

Result: 在多个基准、模型和RL算法上的实验表明，SEAL能够稳定训练过程，并提升智能体的下游任务性能。

Conclusion: 智能体RL中存在独特的循环熵爆发现象，不同于单轮推理RL的熵崩溃模式；SEAL通过针对熵爆发的根本原因，有效缓解了退化模式的累积问题。

Abstract: Agentic large language models are increasingly used to solve real-world tasks by reasoning over goals, invoking tools, and interacting with external environments. Reinforcement learning provides a natural framework for improving these behaviors, and recent agent RL methods have achieved strong results across domains. However, the training dynamics of agent RL remain poorly understood, limiting our ability to diagnose instabilities and design more effective training algorithms. In this work, we identify a previously underexplored phenomenon in agent RL, which we term cyclical entropy eruption. Unlike single-turn reasoning RL, where entropy typically collapses and stays low, agent RL training exhibits unique recurring cycles of sharp entropy eruption and gradual subsidence. We decompose this dynamic into three phases and provide theoretical and empirical analyses of each, explaining the mechanisms underlying its cyclical oscillation. We further show that degenerate patterns such as sentence duplication and hallucination, once acquired during eruption, can persist and accumulate across cycles. Motivated by these findings, we propose SEAL (Separation-Enhanced Agent Learning), a lightweight auxiliary loss that separates correct and incorrect trajectories in representation space, directly targeting the root cause of entropy eruption. Experiments across multiple benchmarks, models, and RL algorithms demonstrate that SEAL stabilizes training and yields stronger downstream agent performance.

</details>


### [307] [Continual Learning in Modern Hopfield Networks with an Application to Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27975)
*Ken Takeda,Masafumi Oizumi,Ryo Karakida*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过现代Hopfield能量分析扩散模型在持续学习中的遗忘机制，证明高能量异常样本更容易被遗忘，而基于能量的回放策略能有效缓解遗忘，并在Stable Diffusion和DDPM上验证了该结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型（如扩散模型）越来越多地通过序列微调进行适应，持续学习成为一个重要问题。然而，生成模型中的持续学习机制尚不清楚：任务变化后，学习分布的哪些方面最容易被遗忘？应该优先回放哪些样本？

Method: 利用现代Hopfield网络（MHN）与扩散模型之间的理论联系，将Hopfield能量引入持续学习分析。提出"内在遗忘"作为任务变化后Hopfield能量的增加量。在MHN中理论证明高能量异常样本比低能量聚类样本更容易遗忘，并分析基于能量的回放策略。

Result: 在MHN中，高能量、离群样本的能量增加幅度大于聚类样本；基于能量的回放对高能量样本特别有效。在Stable Diffusion和DDPM上，Hopfield能量能追踪基于重建的遗忘，回放实验显示出与MHN分析一致的能量依赖性遗忘缓解。

Conclusion: Hopfield能量为生成模型的持续学习遗忘和回放提供了有效的理论分析和实用工具。

Abstract: Generative models, including diffusion models, are increasingly used as foundation models and adapted through sequential fine-tuning, making continual learning an essential problem setting. However, continual learning in such generative models remains poorly understood: after a task change, what aspects of the learned distribution are most easily lost, and what replay samples should be prioritized? We address these questions through the modern Hopfield energy. Recent links between modern Hopfield networks (MHNs) and diffusion models allow analyses in MHNs to be transferred to diffusion models. We introduce intrinsic forgetting as an increase in Hopfield energy after the task change. In tractable settings in an MHN, we prove that high-energy, outlier-like samples undergo a larger energy increase than cluster-like samples, implying that samples located in sharp, isolated basins are more forgettable. We further analyze memory replay and show that replay is particularly effective for high-energy samples, enabling an energy-based selection of replay samples. We validate these predictions in experiments on MHNs and two diffusion models under continual-learning settings: Stable Diffusion and a pixel-space DDPM. In these diffusion models, Hopfield energy tracks reconstruction-based forgetting, and replay experiments reveal energy-dependent mitigation of forgetting that is consistent with the MHN analysis.

</details>


### [308] [Law of Neural Interaction: Depth-Width Shape, Interaction Efficiency, and Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27989)
*Wenjie Sun,Jinning Yang,Shuai Zhang,Mengnan Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经交互概念，将叠加理论从参数空间扩展到梯度空间，发现深度宽度比（R_D/W）影响资源利用效率从而影响泛化，并找到了高效交互区间来指导模型形状初始化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在固定预算下资源利用效率不明，叠加现象被认为是损失的关键因素，但此前研究仅局限于参数空间，缺乏对梯度空间及资源效率与泛化关系的理解。

Method: 基于神经特征假设（Neural Feature Ansatz），将叠加从参数空间扩展到梯度空间，定义为"神经交互"；通过调整深度-宽度比（R_D/W）将模型置于高效交互区间；在固定预算下分析泛化性能与神经交互效率的关系。

Result: 固定预算下，好的泛化伴随高效的神经交互；通过调整R_D/W可使模型进入高效交互区间；预算扩大时该区间保持稳定；在MMLU-Pro基准上，接近该区间的模型表现更优。

Conclusion: R_D/W影响资源利用效率并进而影响泛化，为模型形状初始化和泛化机制理解提供了新见解。

Abstract: The guidance of scaling laws has increased the resource demands of modern large language models (LLMs), yet it remains questionable whether these models utilize resources effectively under a fixed budget. Previous research has proved superposition as a key contributor to loss. By leveraging the Neural Feature Ansatz, we extend superposition from parameter space to gradient space and define it as neural interaction. We find that under a fixed budget, good generalization is usually accompanied by efficient neural interactions, and the model can be placed in an efficient interaction interval by adjusting its depth-width ratio ($R_{D/W}$). In addition, as the budget scales up, the efficient interaction interval of the model remains relatively stable. By comparing existing small scale dense LLMs, we observe that models operating near this interval tend to perform better on the MMLU-Pro benchmark. Our findings reveal that the $R_{D/W}$ influences resource utilization efficiency and thereby affects generalization, providing insights into model shape initialization and the understanding of model generalization mechanisms. Code for Neural Interaction Law is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Neural_Interaction_Law-D788

</details>


### [309] [Geometry-Correct Diffusion Posterior Sampling with Denoiser-Pullback Curvature Guidance and Manifold-Aligned Damping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27990)
*Seunghyeok Shin,Minwoo Kim,Dabin Kim,Hongki Lim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于扩散模型的贝叶斯后验采样方法，用每噪声水平的阻尼高斯-牛顿校正替代传统手工调节的引导权重，通过矩阵自由GMRES求解和扩散校准的秩一阻尼，在多种逆问题上实现了竞争性指标并显著加速，尤其在MRI重建中表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散后验采样中，数据一致性更新的引导权重需要手工调节，且在不稳定算子依赖性曲率下会导致采样不稳定，亟需一种自适应、无需手工调节的稳健方法。

Method: 提出每噪声水平的阻尼高斯-牛顿校正：在扩散状态坐标下计算校正量，通过去噪器回传似然梯度，使用避免前向雅可比矩阵的单侧曲率模型，并应用扩散校准的秩一阻尼（与去噪器残差对齐）。每个校正步通过矩阵自由GMRES结合自动微分求解，采样使用保持方差的Langevin转移（闭式漂移/噪声分离）。

Result: 在FFHQ和ImageNet的多个逆问题上，PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS指标达到竞争性水平，且运行速度显著快于大多数基线方法；在加速MRI重建任务中，PSNR/SSIM指标在所有基线方法中最佳。

Conclusion: 所提方法通过理论驱动的阻尼高斯-牛顿校正替代手工调节，在保持高质量重建的同时大幅提升了采样效率，尤其在医学影像重建领域具有显著优势。

Abstract: Diffusion posterior sampling conditions diffusion priors on measurements, but data-consistency updates are typically scaled by hand-tuned guidance weights and can destabilize sampling under stiff, operator-dependent curvature. We replace scalar guidance with a per-noise-level damped Gauss--Newton correction computed in diffusion-state coordinates. The correction pulls likelihood gradients back through the denoiser, uses a one-sided curvature model that avoids forward denoiser Jacobians, and applies diffusion-calibrated rank-one damping aligned with the denoiser residual. Each correction is solved with matrix-free GMRES using automatic differentiation, and sampling proceeds with a variance-preserving Langevin transition with a closed-form drift/noise split. On FFHQ and ImageNet across inverse problems, it achieves competitive PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS while running markedly faster than most of the compared baselines; on accelerated MRI reconstruction, it achieves the best PSNR/SSIM among the compared baselines.

</details>


### [310] [Patched-DeltaNet: Token-Level Event-Driven Memory for Linear-Time Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27992)
*Tae-Gyun Lee,Junyoung Park,Kyu Won Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Patched-DeltaNet，通过将时间序列分块与门控Delta网络结合，实现O(L/P)复杂度的异常检测，在SMD基准上达到ROC-AUC 0.957和PA-F1 0.822，优于现有Transformer模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于Transformer的时序异常检测模型（如PatchTST）虽有出色表现，但其O(L²)计算复杂度严重限制了在资源受限环境中的部署，亟需更高效的架构。

Method: 结合时间序列分块（Patching）与门控Delta网络（Gated Delta Networks）。分块机制提取局部语义片段，DeltaNet通过误差驱动仅在物理变化显著时更新循环状态，实现token级事件驱动记忆，滤除背景噪声并捕捉异常漂移。

Result: 在Server Machine Dataset基准上，ROC-AUC为0.957，PA-F1为0.822，计算复杂度降至理论最小值O(L/P)，且严格优于同计算预算下的其他架构。

Conclusion: Patched-DeltaNet在保持甚至提升异常检测性能的同时，大幅降低了计算复杂度，是一种适合资源受限场景的高效时序异常检测方案。

Abstract: Time series anomaly detection is critical for maintaining the reliability of mission-critical systems. While Transformer-based models like PatchTST have shown remarkable performance, their $\mathcal{O}(L^2)$ computational complexity severely limits deployment in resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we propose Patched-DeltaNet, a novel architecture combining time-series patching with Gated Delta Networks. By integrating these paradigms, we hypothesize and demonstrate the emergence of token-level event-driven memory, whereby the patching mechanism extracts local semantic chunks, while the error-driven DeltaNet updates its recurrent state exclusively when significant physical changes, defined as deltas, occur. This synergy effectively filters out background noise and captures sudden anomalous drifts. Our rigorous experiments on the Server Machine Dataset (SMD) benchmark demonstrate the structural superiority and sample efficiency of Patched-DeltaNet. By strictly outperforming recent architectures under unified evaluation constraints and identical compute budgets, our model yields an ROC-AUC of 0.957 and PA-F1 of 0.822, while drastically reducing computational complexity to the theoretical minimum of $\mathcal{O}(L/P)$.

</details>


### [311] [Learning Compositional Latent Structure with Vector Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28007)
*Niclas Pokel,Benjamin F. Grewe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出向量网络（VN），一种层级循环架构，用可复用的秩1权重原子库替代固定权重矩阵，通过局部能量最小化推断稀疏激活的原子及其系数，实现样本特定的低秩权重合成，在四个组合泛化基准上显著优于基线模型，尤其在分布外场景下误差降低一个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度网络将多种计算模式存储在共享的稠密权重矩阵中，导致难以在熟悉结构以新组合出现时进行选择性复用或适配，缺乏组合泛化能力。

Method: VN采用层级循环架构，每层维护一个可复用秩1权重原子库；对每个输入执行局部能量最小化，联合约束自底向上的输入重构与自顶向下的反馈一致性，推断稀疏的激活原子集合及其系数，构成输入特定的低秩权重矩阵；学习更新仅作用于被选中的原子，通过推断系数缩放的局部残差信号进行缓慢更新。

Result: 在1D信号、2D空间解码、N体动力学、组合MNIST四个基准上，VN在分布内匹配强基线，在分布外（熟悉因子以新组合出现）场景下误差通常降低约一个数量级。

Conclusion: 向量网络通过将组合泛化作为架构和推理过程的结构性属性，而非将多种行为强行拟合到共享稠密参数中的脆弱副产品，实现了更鲁棒的组合泛化能力。

Abstract: Deep networks are powerful function approximators, but they typically store many different computations in shared weight matrices, making it difficult to selectively reuse or adapt parts of them when a familiar structure appears in novel combinations. We introduce the Vector Network (VN), a hierarchical recurrent architecture in which each layer replaces a fixed weight matrix with a library of reusable rank-1 weight atoms. For each input, VN minimizes a layer-local energy to infer a sparse set of active weight atoms and their coefficients, jointly constrained by bottom-up input reconstruction and top-down feedback consistency. These weight atom coefficients then compose an input-specific low-rank weight matrix for that sample. After convergence, slow learning updates only the selected weight atoms through local residual signals scaled by the inferred coefficients. We evaluate VN on four compositional benchmarks spanning 1D signals, 2D spatial decoding, N-body dynamics, and compositional MNIST. VN matches strong baselines in distribution while often achieving out-of-distribution error about an order of magnitude lower when familiar factors must be recombined in novel ways. Vector networks thus make compositional generalization a structural property of the architecture and inference process rather than a brittle byproduct of fitting many behaviors into one shared dense parameter substrate.

</details>


### [312] [AOE: Exhaustive Out-of-Distribution Detection via Recalibrating Outlier Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28021)
*Fengqiang Wan,Qing-Yuan Jiang,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应置信度异常暴露方法(AOE)，通过温度缩放校准异常样本标签，保留OOD样本与ID类别间的语义关系，从而提升分布外检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Outlier Exposure方法使用均匀标签最大化OOD样本熵，但理论上会导致"过软化效应"（over-softening effect），忽略OOD样本与ID类别间的关联，造成次优的决策边界。

Method: 提出AOE方法，利用温度缩放生成自适应软目标作为OOD样本标签。可学习的温度参数平滑预测分布但不完全消除类别关系信息，在保持语义邻近性的同时接近高熵分布，抑制过度自信预测并扩大分离边界。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验验证了AOE方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 理论分析表明显式利用OOD样本与ID类别间的关系可提升OOD检测性能，AOE通过自适应软标签实现了更优的边际界。

Abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for deploying machine learning models in open-world and safety-critical scenarios, where test inputs may deviate from the training distribution and overconfident predictions on unknown samples can lead to unreliable decisions. Outlier Exposure (OE) has emerged as a promising OOD detection paradigm by introducing auxiliary outliers during training to enlarge the margin between in-distribution (ID) and OOD samples. Existing OE-based methods typically enlarge this margin by employing uniform labels to maximize the entropy of OOD samples over ID categories. However, we theoretically show that uniform labels inevitably disregard the relations between OOD samples and ID categories, termed the over-softening effect, leading to a suboptimal margin bound. Our theoretical analysis further reveals that explicitly exploiting such relations can instead yield improved OOD detection performance. Motivated by this insight, we propose \underline{A}daptive Confidence \underline{OE} (AOE), a simple yet effective method that leverages temperature scaling to recalibrate outlier labels. Specifically, AOE generates adaptive soft targets from temperature-scaled model predictions for OOD samples, where the learnable temperature smooths the prediction distribution without fully erasing class-wise relational information. By supervising OOD samples with these adaptive soft targets, AOE preserves the semantic proximity between OOD samples and ID categories while encouraging the softened targets to approach a high-entropy distribution, thereby suppressing overconfident OOD predictions and enlarging the separation margin. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of AOE.

</details>


### [313] [BPPO: Binary Prefix Policy Optimization for Efficient GRPO-Style Reasoning RL with Concise Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28028)
*Qingfei Zhao,Huan Song,Shuyu Tian,Jiawei Shao,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Binary Prefix Policy Optimization (BPPO)，通过仅使用每组中最短正确和最短错误回答作为更新信号，并聚焦前缀优化，在保持精度的同时实现最高6.08倍加速，并将回答长度减少30-50%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO更新组内所有采样回答成本高昂，且可能强化冗长的推理轨迹。作者探究是否所有回答都提供同等有用的更新信号。

Method: 1) 梯度相似性分析发现同类回答更新方向相似，正误对比信号更有价值；2) BPPO仅用最短正确和最短错误回答作为紧凑更新单元；3) 自适应回答调度与前缀聚焦优化，避免强化冗余后缀。

Result: 在GSM8K、MATH、Geo3K上，BPPO实现最高6.08倍加速，保持竞争性精度，回答长度减少约30-50%，且无需显式长度惩罚。

Conclusion: 并非所有采样回答都同等有用，通过选择性和前缀聚焦的优化策略，可以在大幅降低计算成本的同时获得更简洁的推理轨迹。

Abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is widely used for training reasoning models, but updating all sampled completions in each group incurs substantial cost and can reinforce verbose reasoning trajectories. In this paper, we study whether all completions provide equally useful update signals in GRPO-style reasoning RL. Our gradient-similarity analysis shows that, within the same prompt group, same-class completions often induce highly similar update directions, whereas correct-incorrect pairs provide more distinct contrastive signals. Motivated by this observation, we propose Binary Prefix Policy Optimization (BPPO), which uses the shortest correct completion and the shortest incorrect completion as a compact update unit while preserving full-group advantage normalization. BPPO further improves efficiency with adaptive completion scheduling and prefix-focused optimization; by updating only response prefixes, it avoids reinforcing redundant suffixes and encourages more concise responses. Experiments on GSM8K, MATH, and Geo3K show that BPPO achieves up to 6.08x speedup over GRPO while maintaining competitive accuracy, and reduces mean response length by approximately 30-50% without modifying the reward with an explicit length penalty.

</details>


### [314] [SPARD: Defending Harmful Fine-Tuning Attack via Safety Projection with Relevance-Diversity Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28030)
*Shuhao Chen,Weisen Jiang,Yeqi Gong,Shengda Luo,Chengxiang Zhuo,Zang Li,James T. Kwok,Yu Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPARD是一种结合安全投影交替优化与相关-多样性数据选择的防御框架，能有效抵御有害微调攻击，在保持高任务精度的同时大幅降低攻击成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型微调常破坏其安全对齐，尤其是有害微调攻击会利用对抗数据移除安全机制并诱导不安全行为，亟需有效的防御方法。

Method: 1) SPAG：在效用更新与显式安全投影之间交替优化，使用安全数据集强制执行安全约束；2) 引入相关-多样性行列式点过程(RD-DPP)选择紧凑的安全数据，平衡任务相关性与安全覆盖范围。

Result: 在GSM8K和OpenBookQA数据集上，针对四种有害微调攻击，SPARD获得最低的平均攻击成功率，显著优于现有最优防御方法，同时保持高任务准确率。

Conclusion: SPARD通过安全投影优化与智能数据选择的结合，为抵御有害微调攻击提供了有效且实用的防御方案。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models often undermines their safety alignment, a problem further amplified by harmful fine-tuning attacks in which adversarial data removes safeguards and induces unsafe behaviors. We propose SPARD, a defense framework that integrates Safety-Projected Alternating optimization with Relevance-Diversity aware data selection. SPARD employs SPAG, which optimizes alternatively between utility updates and explicit safety projections with a set of safe data to enforce safety constraints. To curate safe data, we introduce a Relevance-Diversity Determinantal Point Process to select compact safe data, balancing task relevance and safety coverage. Experiments on GSM8K and OpenBookQA under four harmful fine-tuning attacks demonstrate that SPARD consistently achieves the lowest average attack success rates, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art defense methods, while maintaining high task accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/shuhao02/SPARD.

</details>


### [315] [RW-TTT: Batched Serving for Request-Owned Test-Time Training State](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28053)
*Jian Yang,Zhizhuo Kou,Yao Tian,Hao Zhang,Han Chen,Sirui Han,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RW-TTT，一种支持批量处理读写状态TTT请求的LLM服务方案，通过标记解码步骤的所属、版本和读写效应，实现9.31倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TTT在生成过程中需要维护和更新请求专属的状态（如快速权重、低秩增量等），这破坏了批量LLM服务中共享静态权重的假设。串行执行虽正确但缓慢，朴素批处理又会污染请求状态，因此需要一种既能批处理又能保证状态隔离的服务方案。

Method: 提出RW-TTT，为每个解码步骤标记所属请求、版本以及是READ还是WRITE效应，仅批处理兼容的阶段，并将更新仅提交给对应的所属请求。通过在批处理时区分和隔离不同请求的状态更新，实现安全高效的并行服务。

Result: 在单GPU上使用8个快速权重InPlace-TTT流，RW-TTT达到274.61 tokens/s的聚合吞吐量，相比串行服务加速9.31倍，相比相同内存预算下的每流副本加速3.44倍。在RULER长上下文基准测试中保持行为正确性，并通过所属/版本检查。

Conclusion: RW-TTT有效解决了TTT请求在批量服务中的状态隔离问题，在不牺牲正确性的前提下显著提升了TTT服务的吞吐量。

Abstract: Test-time training (TTT) adapts an LLM during generation by reading and updating request-owned state, such as fast weights, low-rank deltas, or streaming learner state. This breaks batched LLM serving, which assumes shared static weights: serial execution is correct but slow, while naive batching can corrupt request state. We formulate this problem as read-write TTT serving and present RW-TTT , which tags each decode step with its owner, version, and READ/WRITE effect, batches only compatible phases, and commits updates only to the owner. On one GPU with eight fast-weight InPlace-TTT streams, RW-TTT reaches 274.61 aggregate tok/s, 9.31x over sequential serving and 3.44x over per-stream replicas under the same memory budget. It preserves behavior on RULER, a long-context benchmark, and passes owner/version checks.

</details>


### [316] [On the Learnability of Test-Time Adaptation: A Recovery Complexity Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28057)
*Zhi Zhou,Ming Yang,Shi-Yu Tian,Kun-Yang Yu,Lan-Zhe Guo,Yu-Feng Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次提出测试时自适应（TTA）在非平稳数据流下的可学习性理论框架，定义了(ε,δ)-恢复复杂度和(ε,ρ)-TTA可学习性，推导了恢复复杂度的上下界，揭示了TTA的自适应-信息权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TTA方法虽经验成功，但缺乏理论框架来理解其在非平稳流上的可学习性，尤其是缺少能同时刻画连续分布偏移和信息约束的原则性理论。

Method: 提出(ε,δ)-恢复复杂度衡量偏移后恢复时间，(ε,ρ)-TTA可学习性衡量长期可靠性；引入非平稳测试流的离散代理变量，实现渐变和突变偏移的统一分析；推导恢复复杂度的匹配上下界。

Result: 得到了恢复复杂度的阶匹配下界和上界，揭示了TTA的根本极限和自适应-信息权衡，提供了统一的可学习性保证。

Conclusion: 该理论框架填补了TTA在非平稳流上可学习性研究的空白，为理解TTA的适应能力和信息约束提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt models to maintain reliable performance on non-stationary test streams without requiring labeled data. Despite its empirical success, the learnability of TTA under non-stationary streams remains unexplored. A key challenge is the lack of a principled theoretical framework that simultaneously aligns with the TTA objective and captures both continuously evolving distribution shifts and intrinsic information constraints. To address this gap, we propose the first theoretical framework for studying the learnability of TTA and introduce $(ε,δ)$-Recovery Complexity and $(ε,ρ)$-TTA Learnability. Recovery complexity measures the post-shift time needed to maintain excess risk below a target level with high probability, and is further extended to TTA learnability, which measures the long-term reliability of TTA. Within this framework, we introduce a novel discrete surrogate for non-stationary test streams, enabling a unified and tractable analysis of both gradual and abrupt shifts. We derive order-wise matching lower and upper bounds on recovery complexity, revealing fundamental limits of TTA and an intrinsic adaptivity-information trade-off. These results provide unified learnability guarantees for TTA that complement regret-based analyses.

</details>


### [317] [PINE: Pruning Boosted Tree Ensembles with Conformal In-Distribution Prediction Equivalence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28068)
*Haruki Yajima,Yusuke Matsui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PINE是一种针对树集成模型的剪枝方法，通过在分布内区域保持预测等价性，并利用共形校准控制区域大小，在保持预测一致性的同时将压缩率提升高达30%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有忠实剪枝方法虽能保证全局预测等价性，但压缩率较低。作者希望在保证决策一致性的前提下提升压缩效率。

Method: 提出PINE方法，在分布内区域（而非全局）保持预测等价性，并通过单一参数α结合共形校准（conformal calibration）控制该区域的大小。

Result: 在12个公开表格数据集上，PINE相比现有忠实剪枝方法，压缩率提升最高达30%，同时预测保持水平相当。

Conclusion: PINE在预测等价性和压缩率之间取得了更好的平衡，是一种实用的树集成模型剪枝方案。

Abstract: Tree ensembles are machine learning models with strong predictive performance and interpretability, and remain widely used for tabular data. Standard pruning methods for tree ensembles typically optimize an accuracy-compression trade-off and may change a subset of predictions, potentially compromising decision consistency. Faithful pruning methods address this issue by preserving prediction equivalence over the entire input space, but this requirement leads to lower compression ratios. We propose PINE, a pruning method that provides strong guarantees within an in-distribution region. PINE preserves prediction equivalence within this region and controls the region size using a single parameter $α$ via conformal calibration. Experiments on 12 public tabular datasets show that PINE improves the compression ratio by up to $30\%$ while preserving predictions at a comparable level to existing faithful pruning methods.

</details>


### [318] [Measure-to-measure Regression with Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28075)
*Matthew Vandergrift,Martha White,Yury Polyanskiy,Philippe Rigollet,Lazar Atanackovic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Transformer的两种方法（静态映射与动态速度场）来解决度量到度量（M2M）回归问题，能够学习概率测度之间的非线性映射，并在合成实验、相互作用粒子系统及结直肠癌类器官数据集上验证了其泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多科学问题（如细胞演化）需要预测群体在未知变换下的演化，传统回归方法将样本视为独立数据点，忽略了群体作为概率测度的整体结构。现有M2M回归方法在表达能力和可扩展性上存在不足。

Method: 将M2M回归形式化为非线性问题，提出两种基于Transformer的方法：1) 静态M2M映射——直接将Transformer作为度量之间的映射函数；2) 动态M2M速度场——利用Transformer学习概率分布的演化速度场。两种方法均利用了Transformer天然的测度依赖性和均值场结构。

Result: 在合成实验、相互作用粒子系统以及大规模患者来源的结直肠癌类器官数据集上验证了方法有效性，能够泛化到未见过的度量。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于Transformer的M2M回归方法具有表达力强、易于使用且可扩展的特点，特别适用于需要以群体为单位预测演化的科学应用场景。

Abstract: Many learning problems require predicting how populations evolve under an unknown transformation. A natural representation for such populations is a probability measure, with point clouds as a key example. In this work, we study the measure-to-measure (M2M) regression problem, in which one seeks to learn a map between probability measures from a finite collection of observed input-output pairs. In contrast to classical regression, where individual samples are transformed independently, M2M regression treats entire distributions as the data points. This perspective is vital in certain scientific applications, for example, cellular and molecular biology, where cells are known to evolve not as independent data points but as a collection. However, few existing approaches address the problem of M2M regression with sufficient expressivity and scalability. We present a formalization of nonlinear M2M regression and introduce two easy-to-use, expressive, and scalable approaches to learn such operators: transformers as static M2M maps and transformers as dynamic M2M velocity fields. Our approach leverages the natural measure-dependent and mean-field structure of transformers to learn nonlinear M2M maps on the space of probability distributions. We illustrate the effectiveness of our proposed method to generalize to unseen measures on synthetic experiments, interacting particle systems, and a large-scale patient-derived organoid dataset for predicting treatment response in colorectal cancer.

</details>


### [319] [Benchmarking Inductive Biases for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection with a Robust Multi-View Channel-Graph Detector](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28103)
*Junhao Wei,Yanxiao Li,Bidong Chen,Yifu Zhao,Haochen Li,Dexing Yao,Baili Lu,Xudong Ye,Jietian Feng,Sio-Kei Im,Yapeng Wang,Xu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对多变量时间序列异常检测进行了统一实验、分析和基准研究，评估了10种代表性检测器在5个数据集上的表现，并提出了一种自适应检测器家族（ours），在VUS-ROC指标上达到最优（0.675），比第二名的LSTM-AE高出5.1个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MTS异常检测方法评估缺乏统一性，数据预处理、评分方式、硬件配置和评估指标各异，导致方法间比较不公平；同时缺乏对方法鲁棒性和跨数据集泛化能力的系统研究。

Method: 统一10种覆盖统计、重建、关联、频率和通用Transformer五大家族的方法，在5个数据集上采用相同的窗口化、评分、硬件和评估指标协议进行有效性、效率、鲁棒性和跨数据集泛化评估；同时提出一种自适应检测器家族，结合NOTEARS约束的有向通道图视图、可选的patch-attention和时间关联视图。

Result: ours取得最佳宏平均VUS-ROC（0.675，比第二名LSTM-AE高5.1个百分点），在所有5个数据集上均排名前三；在噪声、通道丢失和时间偏移扰动下均获得最强的绝对VUS-ROC；发现三个方法无关的结论：无单一偏好的基线占主导、绝对扰动VUS-ROC比保留比率更有信息量、MSDS是事件密集型部署工作负载而非稀疏点异常基准。

Conclusion: 统一基准表明当前无通用最优的检测方法，ours在整体效果和鲁棒性上表现最佳；MSDS数据集的特性需要重新审视；开放的预处理协议、配置和脚本有利于未来研究复现和对比。

Abstract: We present a unified experiment, analysis, and benchmark study of multivariate time-series (MTS) anomaly detection. Ten family-representative detectors -- spanning statistical, reconstruction, association, frequency, and generic-transformer families -- are evaluated on five datasets (SMD, MSL, SMAP, PSM, and MSDS) under effectiveness, efficiency, robustness, and cross-dataset generalisation. All methods share the same windowing, scoring, hardware, and metric protocols. Effectiveness, ablation, and robustness use three random seeds; cross-dataset transfer uses seed~0 because each extra seed requires $250$ source-target evaluations. The benchmark yields three method-independent findings: no single-bias baseline dominates; absolute perturbation VUS-ROC is more informative than retention ratios; and MSDS behaves as an event-dense deployment workload rather than a sparse point-anomaly benchmark. Under this protocol we also introduce \ours{}, an adaptive detector family combining a NOTEARS-constrained directed channel-graph view with optional patch-attention and temporal-association views. \ours{} achieves the best macro-average VUS-ROC ($0.675$, $+5.1$~pt over the second-best LSTM-AE), ranks first overall, and reaches the top-3 on all five datasets. Its wins on MSL and MSDS are narrow, while its average and robustness gains are larger: under the same three-seed robustness protocol for every method, it obtains the strongest absolute VUS-ROC across noise, channel dropout, and time-shift perturbations. We release the MSDS preprocessing protocol, configurations, scripts, and seed-level metric dumps.

</details>


### [320] [Long Live The Balance: Information Bottleneck Driven Tree-based Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28109)
*Hao Jiang,Shurui Li,Tianpeng Bu,Bowen Xu,Xin Liu,Qihua Chen,Hongtao Duan,Lulu Hu,Bin Yang,Minying Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于信息瓶颈理论的IB-Score指标，用于评估大语言模型在线强化学习中的探索-利用平衡，并据此设计了IB-TPO框架，通过信息瓶颈引导的树采样策略显著提升了推理任务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线RL方法（如GRPO）在LLM推理任务中存在探索-利用权衡不平衡的问题，导致优化不稳定且性能次优。

Method: 提出IB-Score指标（基于信息瓶颈理论，量化步骤级推理多样性与正确答案互信息之间的权衡）；设计IB-TPO框架，将IB-Score作为细粒度优化目标，并提出IB引导的树采样策略（同token预算下多生成50%轨迹，并利用树结构进行IB-Score蒙特卡洛估计）。

Result: IB-TPO在标准基准测试上比GRPO基线提升2.9%至3.6%，并超越其他SOTA在线RL方法。

Conclusion: 信息瓶颈理论可有效指导和优化LLM在线强化学习的探索-利用平衡，IB-TPO是一个高效且性能优越的框架。

Abstract: Recent advances in online reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated promising performance in complex reasoning tasks. However, they often exhibit an imbalanced exploration-exploitation trade-off, resulting in unstable optimization and sub-optimal performance. We introduce IB-Score, a novel metric grounded in Information Bottleneck theory that evaluates policy's exploration-exploitation balance by quantifying the trade-off between step-level reasoning diversity and mutual information shared with the correct answer. Analysis based on IB-Score shows that popular online RL approaches (e.g., GRPO) with common regularizers fail to consistently maintain balance during training with suboptimal results. To address this, we propose Information Bottleneck-driven Tree-based Policy Optimization (IB-TPO), a principled framework that formulates IB-Score as a fine-grained optimization objective and utilizes a novel IB-guided tree sampling strategy that not only improves the efficiency of online sampling with 50% more trajectories under the same token budget, but also reuses the tree structure for effective IB-Score Monte Carlo estimation. Extensive experiments across standard benchmarks show that our method significantly outperforms GRPO baseline by 2.9% to 3.6% and also outperforms other state-of-the-art online RL approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/alibaba/EfficientRL.

</details>


### [321] [Chreode: A Cell World Model for One-Step Temporal Dynamics and Perturbation Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28111)
*Mufan Qiu,Genhui Zheng,Yinuo Xu,Ruichen Zhang,Ying Ding,Qi Long,Tianlong Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Chreode 是一个单步细胞状态世界模型，通过结构化的残差转移算子预测动作条件化的细胞状态转变，将分布演化从推理时间转移到训练时间。在 240 万细胞的小鼠胚胎图谱上预训练后，作为微调初始化可提升分化任务性能，作为迁移基因状态嵌入可将 GEARS 的误差降低 12.4%，并在零样本克隆命运评分上与强基线竞争。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么拟合静态的控制到处理映射而丢弃时间信息，要么在独立数据集上求解多步 ODE/薛定谔桥问题，缺乏一个统一、高效且可迁移的细胞状态转变预测框架。

Method: 提出 Chreode，一个单步预测的细胞世界模型，核心是结构化残差转移算子。将分布演化从推理时间转移到训练时间，实现单次生成。分解为下坡景观流、旋转切向动力学和随机扩散三部分。使用共享 scVI 编码器和 DiT 动力学骨干在 240 万细胞小鼠胚胎图谱上预训练。

Result: 作为微调初始化，在 Weinreb 造血和 Veres 胰岛分化任务上优于 PI-SDE 和 PRESCIENT。作为迁移嵌入，将 GEARS 的 DE20 均方误差从 0.2121 降至 0.1858（12.4% 提升）。零样本克隆命运评分与强动态 OT 基线竞争。

Conclusion: 预训练的发育轨迹动力学编码了可迁移到 CRISPR 诱导状态转变的分化基元，因为两者共享潜在几何中的细胞状态转变机制。表明大规模预训练的动力学表征具有跨任务迁移能力。

Abstract: Predicting how a cell will change its transcriptional state under a developmental signal or a genetic perturbation is the computational core of in-silico biology and the AI Virtual Cell program. Existing approaches either fit static control-to-treated maps that discard time, or solve multi-step ODE / Schrödinger-bridge problems on each dataset independently. We introduce Chreode, a one-step cell world model that predicts action-conditioned cell-state transitions through a structured residual transition operator. It shifts distributional evolution from inference time to training time, enabling single-pass generation while preserving a Waddington-inspired decomposition into downhill landscape flow, rotational in-tangent dynamics, and stochastic spread. The model is pretrained with a shared scVI encoder and a DiT-based dynamics backbone on a 2.4M-cell mouse embryonic atlas spanning 7 datasets. As a fine-tuning initialization, Chreode improves per-target Sinkhorn distance on Weinreb hematopoiesis and Veres islet differentiation over matched scratch models, PI-SDE, and PRESCIENT. As a transferable gene-state embedding for GEARS, the pretrained dynamics representation reduces shared-vocabulary DE20 mean squared error on Norman Perturb-seq from 0.2121 to 0.1858, a 12.4% relative improvement, without changing the GEARS training procedure. We interpret this transfer to perturbation prediction as evidence that pretrained developmental-trajectory dynamics encode differentiation primitives transferable to CRISPR-induced state shifts, since both involve cell-state transitions in a shared latent geometry. The pretrained backbone additionally produces zero-shot clonal fate scores on Weinreb that are competitive with strong dynamic-OT baselines.

</details>


### [322] [Adaptive Coarse-to-Fine Subgoal Refinement for Long-Horizon Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28127)
*Kaiqiang Ke,Shenghong He,Chengdong Xu,Yuheng Luo,Xiangyuan Lan,Chao Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CFHRL，一种完全离线的分层目标条件强化学习框架，通过自适应递归细化远距离目标，在长视野任务中显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线GCRL在长视野任务中面临远距离状态-目标对监督弱、值估计受累积自举误差影响的问题，而现有分层方法的固定时间抽象或层次深度与不同可达性水平的状态-目标对不匹配。

Method: CFHRL从最终目标开始递归提出中间子目标，利用回放支持候选进行训练，并通过学习到的可达性成本估计当前目标是否可局部执行来决定何时停止细化。子目标无需精确中点或全局最优，只需提供可靠进展并降低剩余到达难度。

Result: 在OGBench多个长视野任务上取得显著性能提升，消融实验验证了提出的细化与停止机制的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的近似递归收缩在理论上具有鲁棒性，CFHRL通过自适应的粗到细分层策略有效解决了离线GCRL中的长视野挑战。

Abstract: Offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) is challenging in long-horizon tasks, where distant state--goal pairs provide weak supervision and value estimates become vulnerable to accumulated bootstrapping errors. Hierarchical methods mitigate this difficulty by introducing intermediate subgoals, but fixed temporal abstractions or fixed hierarchy depths can be mismatched to state--goal pairs with different reachability horizons. We propose Coarse-to-Fine Hierarchical Goal Reinforcement Learning (CFHRL), a fully offline GCRL framework that adaptively refines distant goals before execution. Starting from the final goal, CFHRL recursively proposes intermediate targets, trained from replay-supported candidates, and stops refinement once the current target is estimated to be locally executable by a learned reachability cost. The key idea is that a subgoal need not be an exact midpoint or globally optimal waypoint; it only needs to provide reliable progress and reduce the remaining reaching difficulty, enabling subsequent refinement over shorter horizons. A stylized analysis further supports the robustness of approximate recursive contraction. Experiments on OGBench show substantial gains on several long-horizon tasks, with ablations validating the proposed refinement and stopping mechanisms

</details>


### [323] [Learning to Bid in Repeated Second-Price Auctions with Dynamic Values and Aggregated Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28133)
*Benjamin Heymann,Otmane Sakhi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究动态价值投标人的在线学习竞价问题，提出结合插件估计与微分方程最优策略的方法，在线性分段和一般平滑原函数下分别实现$\widetilde{O}(\log N)$和$\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$的近乎最优遗憾，无需显式随机化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的投标人往往面临动态价值场景（如拍卖获胜后价值下降），但现有研究多假设价值静态。本文旨在解决价值依赖于历史结果时，投标人如何同时平衡即时收益与未来价值影响，并学习未知环境参数的问题。

Method: 将插件估计器与最优策略的微分方程刻画相结合；针对分段线性原函数设计置信界算法实现$\widetilde{O}(\log N)$遗憾；对一般平滑原函数采用更通用的方法实现$\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$遗憾。

Result: 分段线性原函数下遗憾为$\widetilde{O}(\log N)$，一般平滑原函数下遗憾为$\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$，且均无需显式随机化；数值实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 提出的学习框架在动态价值拍卖场景下实现了近乎最优的遗憾界，为连续时间拍卖中依赖历史结果的投标策略提供了理论基础和实用算法。

Abstract: We study the problem of learning to bid when the bidder's value is dynamic, i.e., when the current value depends on past outcomes. Specifically, we consider a bidder participating in repeated second-price auctions whose value depends on the time elapsed since their last successful bid, with auctions arriving in continuous time and only aggregated feedback revealed at the end of the horizon. Such a bidder must (1) balance the immediate benefit of winning the current auction against its impact on future values and (2) learn unknown environmental parameters. We derive regret bounds for a class of learning methods that combine plug-in estimators with a differential-equation characterization of the optimal policy, and show that a specific confidence bound algorithm learns the optimal policy with a near optimal regret of $\widetilde{O}(\log N)$ for piecewise linear primitives, and $\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$ for general, smooth primitives, achieving these regrets without explicit randomization. These theoretical results are supported by numerical experiments.

</details>


### [324] [Self-Consistency via Marginal Sharpening](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28142)
*Aleksei Arzhantsev,Otmane Sakhi,Nicolas Chopin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将推理时的采样目标从完整输出分布转移到答案边际分布，并设计了一种高效的纯自回归并行采样算法来近似实现，在数学和编程任务上显著优于传统power sampling方法且速度更快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有power-sampling方法通过锐化完整输出分布来增强推理，但完整输出将推理轨迹与最终答案混杂在一起，而真正重要的是答案是否被多条合理的推理路径支持。因此，作者认为应当针对答案边际分布进行锐化，而非完整输出分布。

Method: 提出将self-consistency从后处理的投票准则转变为推理时的目标函数，即锐化答案边际分布。进一步发现该边际目标存在高效近似方案，设计了一种简单的纯自回归并行采样算法来近似采样锐化后的答案边际分布。

Result: 在数学和编程基准测试上，该方法相比标准power sampling取得了更强的性能，同时运行速度提升了数个数量级。

Conclusion: 推理时采样的正确目标应当是答案边际分布而非完整输出分布，并且该目标可以被高效近似实现，兼顾了性能与效率。

Abstract: Inference-time sampling can elicit strong reasoning abilities from language models without additional training. Existing power-sampling methods do so by sharpening the distribution over full generated outputs, favoring completions that are individually likely under the model. We argue that this is the wrong object to target for reasoning: a completion entangles a reasoning trace with a final answer, whereas what matters is whether an answer is supported by many plausible reasoning paths. We therefore shift the target from the full-output distribution to the sharpened answer marginal, making self-consistency an inference-time objective rather than a post-hoc voting criterion. Surprisingly, this marginal target admits an efficient approximation: we propose a simple, purely autoregressive parallel sampling algorithm that approximately samples from the sharpened answer marginal, eliciting stronger performance than standard power sampling on mathematics and coding benchmarks while being orders of magnitude faster.

</details>


### [325] [Sequential Neural Probabilistic Amplitude Shaping: Learning the Channel's Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28143)
*Mohammad Taha Askari,Lutz Lampe,Amirhossein Ghazisaeidi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出首个神经概率幅度整形方案，采用无块结构、易于实现的序列自回归编码器，兼容算术分布匹配，在考虑所有实现损失的情况下，以更低的速率损失和更高的可达信息率超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有概率幅度整形方法存在实现损失高、速率损失大、可达信息率低等问题，且难以在实际系统中兼顾所有实现损失。

Method: 提出一种无块的（block-less）序列自回归编码器，结合算术分布匹配（arithmetic distribution matching），实现神经概率幅度整形。

Result: 所提方法在考虑所有实现损失的情况下，速率损失更低，可达信息率更高，性能优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 该神经概率幅度整形方法是首个在全面考虑实现损失下仍能超越现有方案的可行方案，且易于实现。

Abstract: We present the first neural probabilistic amplitude shaping that outperforms existing methods while accounting for all implementation losses, using a block-less, easily implementable sequential autoregressive encoder compatible with arithmetic distribution matching, yielding reduced rate loss and higher achievable information rates.

</details>


### [326] [Sign-Aware Gated Sparse Autoencoders: Modeling Anticorrelated Features with Bi-Jump-ReLU Activations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28149)
*Bartosz Wieciech,Zmnako Awrahman,Marcin Czelej,Victor Hugo Jaramillo Velasquez,Wioletta Stobieniecka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种有符号感知的门控稀疏自编码器（SA-GSAE），通过双向门控、有符号幅值和辅助监督，让一个潜变量同时编码正负两种极性，从而避免字典容量浪费，在多个LLM激活点上Pareto优于传统方法，并大幅降低死亡单元比例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准稀疏自编码器强制非负约束，导致极性相反的概念（如"压力太高"vs"压力太低"）需要不同的潜变量来编码，浪费字典容量，且无法高效处理反相关特征。

Method: 提出SA-GSAE：(1) 极性敏感门控选择正负符号的支持集；(2) 有符号幅值路径避免L1收缩；(3) 辅助重构损失防止门控坍塌；(4) 通过Bi-Jump-ReLU激活实现双极共享，一个潜变量沿共享方向编码两种符号。

Result: 在Pythia-1B和SmolLM3-3B上，半宽SA-GSAE在3/6个细胞上严格Pareto优于全宽Gated SAE，其余3个细胞R²差距≤0.025，死亡单元绝对减少0.35-0.62。MLP输出细胞上死亡单元减少约100-500倍。

Conclusion: 有符号感知的SAE设计能显著提升字典效率和重构质量，推荐对称变体（r_i^+ = r_i^-）为默认配置。但全宽SA-GSAE在SmolLM3-3B残差流上会出现可复现的重构坍塌，半宽版本可完全避免。

Abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) extract interpretable features from Large Language Models, but standard variants enforce non-negativity, forcing separate latents for diametrically opposed concepts (e.g., "pressure too high" vs. "pressure too low") and wasting dictionary capacity when features are anticorrelated. We propose the Sign-Aware Gated SAE (SA-GSAE): two-sided gated sparsity with signed magnitude and auxiliary supervision. A polarity-sensitive gate selects support on either sign, a signed-magnitude path avoids L1 shrinkage, and an auxiliary reconstruction prevents gate collapse. Bipolar sharing - one latent encoding both signs along a shared direction - is realised via a new Bi-Jump-ReLU activation; parameter accounting shows sign-awareness stays parameter-efficient even when anticorrelated pairs are rare.
  On real LLM activations across three mid-depth hookpoints on Pythia-1B and SmolLM3-3B (6 cells, 3 seeds), a half-width SA-GSAE at width H strictly Pareto-dominates a full-width Gated SAE at 2H over the entire swept L0 overlap on 3 of 6 cells (both MLP-output hookpoints and resid-mid/Pythia-1B); on the remaining 3 it matches R^2 within 0.025 (max gap -0.008) while cutting dead fraction by 0.35-0.62 absolute. Sweep-geomean dead-fraction reductions are ~100x-500x on MLP-output cells and Pythia-1B resid, ~2x-4x on attention cells and SmolLM3-3B resid. Ablations show the two-sided gate and auxiliary loss are load-bearing (no auxiliary collapses LR to 0.27, 98% dead); tying r_i^+ = r_i^- is indistinguishable (|Delta R^2| = 0.0015), and we recommend this symmetric variant as default. MLP-output gains come from most latents carrying both polarities; on attention, bipolar structure concentrates in a small set of top latents. Full-width SA-GSAE exhibits a reproducible reconstruction collapse at SmolLM3-3B resid that the half-width entirely avoids.

</details>


### [327] [Off-Policy Learning to Reason Works Because It Is More Pessimistic Than You Think](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28150)
*Otmane Sakhi,Aleksei Arzhantsev,Imad Aouali,Flavian Vasile*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨大规模强化学习中离策略（off-policy）训练的问题，指出传统的PPO风格策略梯度方法使用重要性权重修正分布偏移会导致高方差和不稳定。作者提出一种更优的离策略目标构建方式，并通过“隐式悲观主义”解释其有效性——这些目标实际上趋向于比名义目标更保守的策略。基于此，提出一种原则性改进来稳定诱导分布，提升离策略学习效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模强化学习训练大语言模型时，由于生成过程滞后或异步，更新基于旧策略收集的数据，本质上属于离策略学习。但现有PPO风格方法仍将其视为近似在策略训练，使用重要性权重修正分布偏移，这会导致高方差、优化不稳定和熵崩溃等问题。

Method: 作者首先构建了一种直观的离策略目标框架，涵盖多种成功的离策略目标。然后从“隐式悲观主义”角度解释其有效性：这些目标实际上在优化时向比名义目标更保守的策略靠近。接着提出一种原则性改进方法，通过稳定诱导的隐式分布来提升离策略学习效果。

Result: 揭示了离策略目标有效的根本原因在于隐式悲观主义（趋向保守策略），并解释了某些实现选择提升稳定性的机制——它们隐式控制有效目标分布。提出的原则性改进方法能够稳定这种诱导分布，从而提升离策略学习效果。

Conclusion: 大规模强化学习中的离策略训练可以摒弃重要性权重修正，转而拥抱离策略数据本身。通过理解隐式悲观主义机制，可以设计更稳定的离策略学习算法。

Abstract: Large scale reinforcement learning has become a central tool for improving reasoning in large language models. At this scale, generation is often lagged or asynchronous, so updates are performed on data collected by older policies. This makes learning inherently off-policy. Most existing approaches nevertheless remain rooted in PPO-style trust-region objectives, treating training as approximately on-policy and using importance weights to correct distribution mismatch. These corrections can introduce high variance, destabilize optimization, and accelerate entropy collapse. Recent work suggests an alternative: rather than correcting the mismatch, one can embrace off-policy data and remove importance weights, often yielding stronger algorithms. In this paper, we provide an intuitive construction of off-policy objectives that include successful off-policy objectives and show that their effectiveness can be understood through implicit pessimism: they optimize toward target policies that are more conservative than their nominal objectives suggest. This perspective explains why some particular implementation choices improve stability: they implicitly control the effective target distribution. We then propose a principled modification that stabilize this induced distribution and improve off-policy learning.

</details>


### [328] [Temporal Hyperbolic Graph Representation Learning for Scale-Free Internet Routing and Delay Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28155)
*Yi-Ling Kuo,Hao-Yu Tien,Shih-Yu Tsai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HERMIT混合框架，结合双曲时态图神经网络和随机森林，用于预测互联网往返时间（RTT），在真实数据集上优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 互联网RTT预测对路由优化和服务质量保障至关重要，但现有欧几里得空间的TGNN难以捕捉互联网路由图的层次化和无标度结构，需要更合适的表示空间。

Method: 提出HERMIT框架，包含双曲流形保持时态GNN（HMPTGN）和随机森林回归器；引入RTT感知的边特征和可学习边编码器，结合双曲节点表示与历史RTT统计进行预测。

Result: 在2015-2024年大规模真实互联网数据集上，HERMIT相比仅使用历史RTT统计的随机森林基线RMSE提升6%，在大误差重尾样本上表现更优；链接预测性能也超过HMPTGN和HTGN等先前的双曲TGNN模型。

Conclusion: 将双曲时态图学习与树回归结合，为真实互联网拓扑中的RTT预测提供了可扩展的有效解决方案。

Abstract: Predicting Internet round-trip time (RTT) is critical for routing optimization, quality-of-service (QoS) provisioning, and traffic engineering, yet remains challenging due to long-term temporal dependencies, evolving routing dynamics, and heavy-tailed latency distributions. While Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) can model evolving network topologies, most existing approaches operate in Euclidean space, which poorly captures the hierarchical and scale-free structure of Internet routing graphs. Hyperbolic geometry provides a more suitable representation space.
  We propose HERMIT (Hyperbolic Edge-aware RTT Modeling via Integrated Topology), a hybrid framework combining a hyperbolic manifold-preserving temporal GNN with a Random Forest regressor for joint link prediction and RTT prediction. Built on HMPTGN, HERMIT introduces RTT-aware edge features and a learnable edge encoder to improve modeling of evolving link states and routing behavior. The resulting hyperbolic node representations are combined with historical RTT statistics for robust latency prediction.
  We evaluate HERMIT on a large-scale real Internet dataset spanning 2015-2024. HERMIT consistently outperforms a strong Random Forest baseline using only historical RTT statistics, achieving a 6% RMSE improvement while reducing large errors on heavy-tailed samples. It also surpasses prior hyperbolic TGNN models, including HMPTGN and HTGN, in link prediction performance. These results demonstrate that combining hyperbolic temporal graph learning with tree-based regression provides a scalable solution for RTT prediction in real-world Internet topologies.

</details>


### [329] [Unification and Optimization of Robust Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28165)
*Jonas Hanselle,Valentin Margraf,Clemens Damke,Eyke Hüllermeier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一的鲁棒学习设计空间，将多种现有方法（如分布鲁棒优化、标签平滑、Mixup等）组织到三个共同的设计轴上，通过序贯阶段（参考分布丰富化、输入空间扰动、标签空间扰动、样本级聚合）分解鲁棒学习，并支持联合超参数优化来组合和配置适合特定任务的鲁棒策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒学习方法各自针对单一失效模式（如分布偏移、标签噪声、有限样本退化）独立开发，迫使从业者在任务主导失效模式不明确时被迫提前做出选择。缺乏统一框架来组合和配置多种鲁棒策略。

Method: 将现有方法组织在三个共同设计轴上，提出序贯训练过程：参考分布丰富化 → 输入空间扰动 → 标签空间扰动 → 样本级聚合，每个阶段可选择悲观、中性或乐观立场，形成一个统一设计空间，支持联合超参数优化。

Result: 在表格数据、图像数据和奖励建模的基准测试中，联合超参数优化在每种设置下都与最佳单一方法基线具有竞争力，为不确定哪种失效模式主导任务的从业者提供了可靠的默认方案。

Conclusion: 该统一框架通过分解鲁棒学习为序贯阶段并支持联合优化，有效解决了从业者需预先承诺单一失效模式的问题，提供了一种灵活且可靠的鲁棒学习默认策略。

Abstract: The literature has proposed various robust alternatives to empirical risk minimisation to address failure modes such as distribution shift, label noise and finite-sample degeneracies. Examples include distributionally robust optimization, label smoothing, vicinal risk minimization, and Mixup. However, such approaches are typically developed in isolation, forcing practitioners to commit a priori to a single failure mode even when the dominant mode for the task is unclear. To address this, we organize a broad class of existing methods along three common design axes and derive a tractable training procedure that decomposes robust learning into sequential stages (reference distribution enrichment, input-space perturbation, label-space perturbation, and sample-level aggregation), each with a choice of stance (pessimistic, neutral, or optimistic). This results in a unified design space in which joint hyperparameter optimization can compose and configure robustness strategies suited to the task at hand. Across tabular, image, and reward modeling benchmarks, joint hyperparameter optimization is competitive with the best single-method baseline in each setting, offering a reliable default for practitioners who do not know a priori which failure mode dominates their task.

</details>


### [330] [QuITE: Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28166)
*JungHoon Lim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: QuITE是一个即插即用的嵌入模块，通过可学习查询令牌和单层自注意力机制，将不规则多变量时间序列直接转换为与现有骨干网络兼容的潜在表示，在预测和分类任务上分别取得最高54.7%和15.8%的相对性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IMTS建模方法存在两个主要局限：1) 设计专用架构限制了成熟MTS模型的重用；2) 通过插值将IMTS映射到规则网格会引入人工值，扭曲时间动态。作者发现关键瓶颈在于传统嵌入层假设均匀采样，而非骨干网络本身。

Method: 提出QuITE（Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding），一个即插即用的嵌入模块。核心思想是利用可学习的查询令牌（query tokens）通过单层自注意力机制聚合不规则观测数据，直接生成与骨干网络兼容的潜在表征，无需生成人工值或修改架构。

Result: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上，QuITE一致提升了各类MTS骨干模型的表现：预测任务平均相对增益最高达54.7%，分类任务达15.8%。

Conclusion: QuITE有效解决了IMTS建模中嵌入层与不规则采样不匹配的核心问题，提供了一种简单、通用且高效的解决方案，无需改造现有MTS骨干架构即可处理不规则时间序列。

Abstract: Irregular Multivariate Time Series (IMTS) are common in practice, yet their irregular sampling complicates effective modeling. Existing approaches typically either (i) design specialized architectures that limit the reuse of proven Multivariate Time Series (MTS) models, or (ii) map IMTS onto regular temporal grids through interpolation, which may distort temporal dynamics by introducing artificial values. To address these limitations, we propose a new input-embedding-based approach. We identify that the key bottleneck lies not in the backbone architecture, but in conventional embedding layers that assume uniform sampling. In this work, we introduce QuITE (Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding), a simple yet effective plug-and-play embedding module for IMTS. QuITE employs learnable query tokens to aggregate irregular observations through a single self-attention layer, directly producing backbone-compatible latent representations without artificial value generation or architectural modification. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks show that QuITE consistently improves MTS models, yielding average relative gains of up to $54.7\%$ in forecasting and $15.8\%$ in classification across diverse datasets and backbone architectures. Code is available at: https://github.com/Meaningfull9502/QuITE.

</details>


### [331] [Joint Training of Multi-Token Prediction in Reinforcement Learning via Optimal Coefficient Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28184)
*Zili Wang,Jiajun Chai,Lin Chen,Xiaohan Wang,Shiming Xiang,Guojun Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从优化视角重新审视了RLVR与MTP联合训练失败的原因，将MTP对RL目标的每步影响分解为一阶相关项和二阶扰动惩罚项，并提出了自适应最优系数校准方法OCC，在六个数学推理基准上取得了优于或持平于分离基线（Detach）的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR是提升LLM推理能力的标准范式，MTP是预训练中广泛采用的模块，二者联合训练是自然思路，但当前实践发现联合训练会降低性能，因此需要探究其根本原因并提出改进方案。

Method: 从优化角度将MTP对RL目标的每步影响分解为一阶相关项（促进对齐）和二阶扰动惩罚项（破坏优化），统一了Detach、交叉熵损失和策略损失三种训练范式的分析框架；基于此分析提出OCC（最优系数校准），通过log-probability代理在线追踪最优系数，以极低成本实现自适应调节。

Result: 在六个竞赛级数学推理基准上，OCC一致地匹配或超越了Detach基线，实现了更好的联合MTP-RL训练性能。

Conclusion: 通过优化视角的理论分解，揭示了MTP与RL联合训练失效的根本原因，并提出了有效的自适应校准方案OCC，为后续RLVR与MTP的联合训练提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as the standard paradigm for improving reasoning capability of large language models, while Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has been a widely adopted module in pretraining. Combining them is a natural approach, yet current RL practices detach MTP gradients because joint training degrades the performance. We revisit this failure from an optimization perspective. We show that the per-step effect of MTP on the RL objective can be decomposed into two terms: a first-order correlation and a second-order perturbation penalty. This decomposition unifies three MTP training regimes: Detach, Cross-Entropy loss, and Policy loss, and explains why each succeeds or fails. Further analysis of policy loss reveals that, although it aligns with intuition, performance still degrades: the correlation term decays while the quadratic penalty persists. Guided by the analysis, we propose Optimal Coefficient Calibration (OCC), an adaptive scheme that tracks the optimal coefficient online via a log-probability proxy at negligible cost. Across six competition-level mathematical reasoning benchmarks, OCC consistently matches or exceeds the detach baseline, delivering improved joint MTP-RL training performance.

</details>


### [332] [Hierarchical Synthetic Tabular Data Generation: A Hybrid Top-Down and Bottom-Up Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28198)
*Junfeng Nie,Alvin Jin,Xiaohui Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种分层混合上下结合（H-TDBU）框架，通过解耦语义结构与随机纹理，在弱多模态金融基准上提升了合成表格数据的逻辑一致性、稀有事件覆盖和统计保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有合成表格数据方法（纯生成模型或LLM）面临数据异质性、逻辑一致性差、稀有事件覆盖率低及低数据场景下鲁棒性不足的问题。

Method: 提出H-TDBU框架：自上而下路径构建结构化逻辑约束与跨模态对齐规则，自下而上路径使用轻量级表格生成器学习局部统计模式，两路径通过迭代反馈循环在统一合成引擎中整合。

Result: 在弱多模态金融基准（表格+情感文本）上，H-TDBU相较于神经基线方法提升了训练-合成-测试-真实性能，同时保持了语义一致性。

Conclusion: 分层规则引导的合成为数据生成提供了结合可控性、语义连贯性与统计保真度的有效机制。

Abstract: Existing approaches for synthetic tabular data generation are based on either purely generative models or LLMs, both of which struggle with data heterogeneity, logical consistency, rare-event coverage, and robustness in low-data regimes. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical hybrid top-down and bottom-up (H-TDBU) framework that decouples semantic structures from stochastic texture. In the top-down path, structure-driven logical constraints and cross-modal alignment rules are constructed, while in the bottom-up path, lightweight tabular generators are used to learn local statistical patterns from real data. The two paths are consolidated in a unified synthesis engine with an iterative feedback loop. We evaluate the framework on weak multimodal financial benchmarks combining tabular and sentiment-text data. Experimental results show that our H-TDBU approach improves train-synthetic-test-real performance over neural baseline methods while preserving semantic consistency. Our results suggest that hierarchical rule-guided synthesis provides an effective mechanism for combining controllability, semantic coherence, and statistical fidelity in synthetic data generation.

</details>


### [333] [Geometry-First Generative Spatial Single-Cell Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28200)
*Ehtesamul Azim,Muhtasim Noor Alif,Tae Hyun Hwang,Yanjie Fu,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GEARS提出了一种几何优先的框架，无需细胞类型标签、组织学图像或细胞-点分配，即可从单细胞RNA测序数据和空间转录组数据重建单细胞尺度的空间几何结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将空间重建绑定到固定网格和特定坐标系统，尤其在非配对设置中存在局限性，无法灵活恢复细胞间的内在空间几何关系。

Method: 学习域不变表达编码器对齐ST点和解离细胞，训练排列等变生成器与扩散精炼器，在重叠子集上预测成对距离，通过全局距离几何问题求解获得二维坐标和密集距离矩阵。

Result: 在全局距离保持、局部邻域保真度和空间分布对齐方面，持续优于强空间映射和反卷积基线方法。

Conclusion: GEARS的几何优先策略在跨切片泛化等实验中表现出色，为整合scRNA-seq和ST数据提供了不依赖固定网格的新范式。

Abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) profiles large numbers of cells but loses spatial context, whereas spatial transcriptomics (ST) preserves partial spatial structure at lower resolution. Most existing integration methods either deconvolve spot mixtures or map cells onto a measured spot lattice, which ties reconstructions to a fixed grid and slide-specific coordinate systems, a limitation that is especially problematic in unpaired settings. We propose GEARS, a geometry-first framework that reconstructs an intrinsic single-cell spatial geometry guided by ST, without relying on cell-type labels, histological images, or cell-to-spot assignment. GEARS first learns a domain-invariant expression encoder that aligns ST spots and dissociated cells, and then trains a permutation-equivariant generator with a diffusion-based refiner with EDM-style preconditioning to generate local spatial geometries under pose-invariant supervision derived from ST coordinates. At inference, GEARS reconstructs geometry on many overlapping subsets of scRNA-seq cells, aggregates predicted pairwise distances across subsets, and solves a global distance-geometry problem to obtain canonical two-dimensional coordinates and a dense distance matrix. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments, including cross-section generalization, show that GEARS consistently improves global distance preservation, local neighborhood fidelity, and spatial distribution alignment compared to strong spatial mapping and deconvolution baselines.

</details>


### [334] [Refining Multidimensional Video Reward Models via Disentangled Influence Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28203)
*Muyao Wang,Zeke Xie,Hideki Nakayama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对文本到视频生成模型评估中的多维视频奖励模型训练问题，提出了维度异质性现象：训练样本在不同评估维度上的可靠性存在显著差异。为此，作者设计了解耦影响框架来估计各维度的监督风险，并提出了维度解耦剪枝和维度解耦重加权两种策略，显著优于传统全局过滤方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有T2V评估需要细粒度多维度的评估，但训练有效的多维奖励模型面临视频数据复杂性的根本挑战。传统基于全局标量指标的过滤方法不适用于T2V任务。

Method: 提出解耦影响框架高效估计维度特定的监督风险，基于此设计了两种维度解耦优化策略：维度解耦剪枝（移除高风险样本）和维度解耦重加权（软性降低高风险样本权重）。

Result: 实验表明，所提出的解耦策略显著优于全局过滤基线，得到的奖励模型与真实标注的对齐程度更高。

Conclusion: 识别了维度异质性这一关键现象，并验证了针对不同评估维度分别处理监督风险的有效性，为T2V评估模型的训练提供了新的方法论。

Abstract: As Text-to-Video (T2V) generation models continue to evolve, the complexity of video evaluation necessitates a fine-grained assessment across various axes. To address this, recent works have focused on developing Multidimensional Video Reward Models (MVRMs), which decompose the evaluation process to better align with the multifaceted nature of human visual perception. However, training effective MVRMs is fundamentally challenged by the complex nature of video data. In this work, we identify a critical phenomenon termed Dimensional Heterogeneity: the reliability of a training sample can vary substantially across evaluation dimensions, meaning that a sample may provide reliable supervision for one objective while inducing high supervision risk for another. Consequently, prevailing data-centric methods that filter based on global scalar metrics are ill-posed for T2V tasks. To address this, we propose a disentangled influence framework that that efficiently estimates dimension-specific supervision risk. Leveraging this framework, we introduce two dimension-disentangled refinement strategies: Dimension-Disentangled Pruning, which removes extreme high-risk samples, and Dimension-Disentangled Reweighting, which softly down-weights high-risk supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our disentangled strategies significantly outperform global filtering baselines, yielding reward models with superior alignment to ground truth.

</details>


### [335] [Robust Contrastive Graph Clustering with Adaptive Local-Global Integration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28209)
*Lei Zhang,Fubo Sun,Haipeng Yang,Zhong Guan,Likang Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合多尺度局部结构与全局语义的对比图聚类框架，通过注意力机制融合不同深度的拓扑信号和动态聚类原型，在8个真实数据集上取得有竞争力的聚类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对比图聚类方法难以灵活捕获高阶局部结构，且常忽略复杂图中的全局语义，导致节点表示次优，尤其在结构碎片化和聚类边界模糊的真实图中表现不佳。

Method: (1) 局部层面：利用GNN提取多传播深度的拓扑信号，通过注意力加权自适应融合多尺度邻域特征；(2) 全局层面：基于动态演化的聚类中心构建语义原型，通过注意力聚合引导节点表示，增强类间分离性；(3) 双视角对比学习框架，结合实例级和结构感知损失联合优化。

Result: 在8个真实图数据集上取得了有竞争力的聚类性能。代码已开源。

Conclusion: 通过注意力机制联合多尺度局部结构与全局语义，有效提升了图聚类的表示鲁棒性和判别性，尤其在复杂图中表现优异。

Abstract: Graph clustering is essential in graph analysis for revealing structural patterns and node communities. Despite recent advances in self-supervised contrastive learning that have improved clustering via structural and attribute signals, existing methods still struggle to flexibly capture high-order local structures and often overlook global semantics in complex graphs. These limitations lead to suboptimal node representations, especially in real-world graphs with fragmented structures and ambiguous cluster boundaries. To address these limitations, a contrastive graph clustering framework is proposed to jointly integrate multi-scale local structures with global semantics via attention mechanisms. At the local level, GNN-based topological signals extracted from multiple propagation depths are adaptively fused through attention-based weighting to capture multi-scale neighborhood features. At the global level, semantic prototypes derived from dynamically evolving cluster centers are adaptively aggregated through attention to guide node representations and enhance inter-cluster separability. The model is trained under a dual-view contrastive learning paradigm with a hybrid objective that combines instance-level and structure-aware losses to improve representation robustness and discrimination. Experiments on eight real-world graph datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive clustering performance. Code is available at https://github.com/vege12138/w2.

</details>


### [336] [PhAME: Phenotype-Aware Molecular Editing via Latent Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28226)
*Łukasz Janisiów,Sebastian Musiał,Bartosz Zieliński,Dawid Rymarczyk,Tomasz Danel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PhAME是一个基于潜在扩散框架的分子编辑方法，通过组合式无分类器引导机制，在保持与已知先导化合物结构相似性的同时，精准优化分子以匹配目标表型特征，在多任务基准上达到最先进水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
